title: Data Solutions Analyst (3+ years experience)
description:
We are looking for a highly analytical and client focused Data Solutions Analyst to join our team. In this role, you will serve as a key bridge between our clients and our data systems. Translate business needs into actionable data solutions. 



You’ll work hands on with large datasets, build and optimize queries, develop dashboards, and ensure data accuracy across our platforms. This position is ideal for someone who enjoys solving complex data problems, communicating clearly with both technical and non technical stakeholders, and taking ownership of work from the initial request through final delivery.



Key Responsibilities

Client & Communication

_Communicate directly with clients via
 and occasional calls to support data-related requests

_Translate client needs into actionable data tasks.  Provide clear status updates and deliver results in a timely manner.

_Maintain a strong service mindset. Focused on responsiveness, professionalism, and problem resolution



Data & Technical Work

_Write and optimize custom queries in Google BigQuery

_Build and maintain structured tables for downstream analytics and reporting

_Develop and manage dashboards in Looker Studio for clients and sales

_Integrate and retrieve data from APIs using tools like Postman

_Support data pipelines and ensure data accuracy and reliability



Problem Solving & Operations

_Troubleshoot data issues and identify root causes efficiently

_Independently investigate and resolve inconsistencies across different datasets

_Take ownership of problems from identification through resolution



Internal Collaboration

_Communicate clearly with internal stakeholders (product, data, sales, operations)

_Develop a strong understanding of data pipelines and end-to-end data workflows

_Work independently while staying aligned with team priorities



Required Skills

_Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a logical and structured approach

_Proficiency in SQL and experience with BigQuery and PSQL

_Experience building dashboards and reports (Looker Studio or similar)

_Familiarity with APIs and tools like Postman

_Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively

_Strong written and verbal communication skills

_Strong understanding of data normalization and standardization best practices, including:

___Structuring data for scalability and performance (e.g., separating dimensions vs facts)

___Creating consistent naming conventions and controlled vocabularies

___Eliminating redundancy and avoiding conflicting data definitions

___Designing datasets that support reliable downstream analytics and reporting



Preferred Experience

_Minimum of 3 years experience

_Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field

_Experience in the electronics component or EMS supply chain

_Familiarity with BOM data, part numbers, or sourcing workflows

_Experience working with large datasets (millions of rows)



What Success Looks Like

_Delivers accurate, client-ready data outputs without constant oversight

_Quickly diagnoses and resolves data issues

_Builds dashboards and tables that are actually used (not just created).  Focused on valuable insights to our customers.

_Communicates clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders

_Takes initiative and improves processes without being asked

title: ** Short-Form Video Editor ** (Ad Creatives & Founder Storytelling)
description:
INTRO:

Are you a creative, detail-oriented editor with a passion for visual storytelling and conversion-driven ads? Do you enjoy the challenge of translating a brand's vision into captivating short-form video content?



I’m Rico, the founder of Lampiece, where we create unique, personalized lamps. My brand is built on authenticity, a personal touch, and the journey of building a business. I am looking for a reliable, intermediate-to-advanced Video Editor to help me scale our content.



Currently, we need 1 Social Media Video and 1 Video Ad Creative per week, with the goal of increasing this output gradually as we grow.



Example of the style we're going for:

- https://www.tiktok.com/@moodsamsterdam/video/7488762893501058326



WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON:

You will receive detailed editing briefs and raw footage to create two distinct types of content:

- Social Media Videos (Storytelling): Founder-led content focusing on my business journey. This requires an authentic, engaging storytelling style.

- Ad Creatives (Conversion-Driven): Direct-response ads using various formats like UGC, mashups, and founder ads.



Note on Language: The final output for all videos will be in both English and Dutch. Don't worry if you don't speak Dutch! You will be provided with clear English instructions and detailed briefs making it very easy to create the Dutch versions (including matching the subtitles).



OUR PERFECT MATCH HAS:

- 2+ years of experience editing either social media videos or ad creatives (experience in both is a major plus!).

- Intermediate to advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects (No CapCut).

- Strong skills in making engaging basic cuts, adding dynamic subtitles, and integrating simple motion graphics.

- A keen eye for pacing, visual aesthetics, and social media platform specifications (TikTok, Instagram Reels, Shorts).

- A proactive attitude and the ability to follow a detailed creative brief.



COMPENSATION:

This is a freelance role, and you will be paid on a per-video basis. As the brand grows, your weekly volume and earning potential will grow with it.



HOW TO APPLY:

To ensure you have read this entire post, please include the word "LAMP" at the very beginning of your application subject line or message. Please send us:

- Your resume

- A link to your portfolio specifically showcasing your short-form video editing skills (please point out which are ads and which are organic social media videos).

- Bonus points: Include a brief proposal on how you'd capture our brand's authenticity and unique charm in video form.

title: SOCIAL MEDIA & CONTENT COORDINATOR — ECOMMERCE (ORGANIC GROWTH FOCUSED)
description:
VIDEO INTERVIEW IS MANDATORY — DO NOT APPLY IF YOU WILL NOT SUBMIT A VIDEO. TEXT APPLICATIONS WILL NOT BE REVIEWED 



SOCIAL MEDIA & CONTENT COORDINATOR — ECOMMERCE (ORGANIC GROWTH FOCUSED)



We are hiring someone to take ownership of our social media execution and organic growth.



This is not a basic posting role. You are responsible for planning, coordinating, and executing content that drives engagement, traffic, and sales — aligned with our website and
 marketing.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



• Build and manage a monthly content calendar aligned with Australian and New Zealand holidays, events, and sales opportunities

• Plan posts around key sales periods and ensure alignment across social media, website, and
 campaigns

• Schedule and publish content consistently

• Work directly with our team and
 specialist to ensure all messaging is aligned

• Use provided raw content, customer reviews, and assets to create engaging posts

• Contribute ideas based on what is performing



ORGANIC GROWTH — NON NEGOTIABLE



You are responsible for growing the page.



• Increase real followers (no fake growth)

• Improve engagement

• Drive traffic to the website



Before starting, you will audit our current social media and identify:

• What is working

• What is not

• What needs to change



You will then complete a 1-month trial.



You must show:

• Measurable growth

• Clear improvements in engagement and/or followers

• Evidence-based decisions



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



• Strong understanding of the Australian market and seasonal trends

• Experience managing ecommerce social media accounts

• Ability to think in campaigns, not random posts

• Strong communication and reliability

• Someone who takes ownership and executes



HOW TO APPLY — VIDEO REQUIRED



You must answer ALL 5 questions below in a short video (2–5 minutes total).



If you do not submit a video, your application will not be reviewed.



QUESTIONS



1. If you were starting from today, how would you grow our Instagram page in the next 30 days? Be specific.



2. What Australian or New Zealand events, holidays, or sales periods would you plan content around in the next 60 days and why?



3. How do you d
 what content to post — not guess, but based on data or logic?



4. Show or describe one social media post you would create for our brand and explain why it would perform.



5. What is your process for turning followers into actual customers, not just likes and views?



Optional:

You may include an example post you would create for our brand using our website as reference.



Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: E-commerce Data Scraping Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a data scraping specialist who understands how to collect, organize, and maintain useful data from e-commerce platforms.



This role is focused on gathering product, pricing, competitor, seller, and marketplace data from platforms such as Shopee, Lazada, and other online selling channels. You should be comfortable working with structured data, handling large product catalogs, and delivering accurate, clean outputs that can support business decisions.



What you’ll handle



Collect product, pricing, seller, review, and competitor data from Shopee, Lazada, and other e-commerce platforms

Extract and organize data in a clear and usable format

Monitor changes in listings, pricing, stock, promotions, and marketplace activity

Build and maintain scraping workflows for recurring data collection

Clean, structure, and validate data before delivery

Work with our team to improve data quality, speed, and reliability over time



What we want



Strong experience with data scraping and web data collection

Experience scraping e-commerce or marketplace platforms

Good knowledge of Python and scraping / automation frameworks

Must know how to use Claude Code and work with it effectively

Comfortable using developer tools needed for data scraping and automation

Ability to deliver clean, accurate, and well-structured datasets

Understanding of product pages, seller listings, reviews, pricing, and marketplace data points

Attention to detail and ability to follow instructions carefully

Reliable communication and consistent delivery



Tools you should know



Python

Scrapy

Playwright, Selenium, or Puppeteer

BeautifulSoup

APIs and JSON data handling

Git and GitHub

Claude Code

Browser developer tools

CSV, Excel, or Google Sheets

Databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite

Basic proxy and session management is a plus

Docker or server deployment knowledge is a plus



How to apply



Send:

“Data Pro”

one direct portfolio link

to your best scraping, automation, or data extraction work



Accepted platforms:

GitHub, Upwork, personal portfolio, or case study links



Please do not send Google Drive, Dropbox, or other file-sharing links.



About us



We are an e-commerce business selling through marketplaces such as Shopee, Lazada, eBay, and our own website. We are building for long-term growth and want someone who is serious about improving, contributing, and growing with the company.



Compensation can be reviewed after 12 months based on performance, consistency, and overall contribution.

title: Social Media & Content Marketing VA (Full-Time, Bonuses + Growth)
description:
We are an established Australian trade services business looking for a full-time Social Media and Content Marketing VA.



This role is responsible for building and executing a social media strategy across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube. You will audit our existing channels and content library, develop a strategy grounded in real analysis, create and schedule content daily, manage comments and DMs, and report on performance each month. The business owner appears on camera - everything else is yours to own and execute.



If you have worked in digital marketing, content creation, social media management, or at a marketing agency - and you can point to specific accounts you have genuinely grown from a smaller base - we want to hear from you.



==============================



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time, stable role with a long-established Australian business

* Starting salary of PHP 33,500 per month during probation, increasing to PHP 35,000 per month after probation

* WE ARE WILLING TO PAY MORE FOR A HIGH-QUALITY, PROVEN CANDIDATE - THE LISTED RATE IS A STARTING POINT

* Additional earning potential through commissions and performance-based bonuses

* Fully remote - work from home

* Flexible hours within Australian timezone

* Long-term role with growing scope over time



==============================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Audit existing social channels, content, and performance data - identify what is working and what is not

* Build a clear content strategy and present it to the business owner

* Create content daily - graphics, captions, short-form video edits, carousels

* Post consistently across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube

* Coordinate with the owner for his on-camera video appearances - brief him on what is needed and handle everything else

* Respond to all comments and DMs daily across all platforms

* Pre-qualify or redirect social leads to the sales team where appropriate

* Track performance monthly and report clearly to the owner

* Provide content and UX input on two business websites (supporting role)



==============================



REQUIREMENTS



* Demonstrated experience growing social media followings from a smaller base - you must be able to show numbers, not just titles

* Ability to build and articulate a content strategy - not just execute one that already exists

* Strong video editing skills - you will be working with raw phone footage filmed in a single take

* Exceptional written English - captions, comments, and DMs are all public-facing brand touchpoints

* Self-directed and able to make decisions without constant guidance

* Comfortable reading platform analytics and adjusting strategy based on data

* Reliable computer, internet connection, and equipment suitable for video editing



==============================



NICE TO HAVE



* HubSpot or CRM experience

* Experience helping a business owner build a personal brand or thought leadership presence

* Background in service-based businesses - trades, home improvement, or similar

* YouTube channel growth experience (long-form content)

* Digital marketing agency experience



==============================



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Flexible hours

* Australian timezone (AEST/AEDT)



==============================



If you have built real followings, can back it up with numbers, and want a role where your results are recognised and rewarded - apply now.



==============================



HOW TO APPLY



* Click "APPLY FOR THIS JOB" button on this job post

* Fill in the Subject field (this is required, but it will not affect your application outcome)

* Optionally, you may write a message

* Click Send

* Once your application is submitted, you will receive an
 from us with the next steps and instructions for the hiring process

title: Video Editor
description:
Location: Remote



We’re looking for a Video Editor to join us as the first member of a brand-new media division within our company.



To start, you’ll focus on producing short-form content for Instagram and
. As we refine our systems, creative direction, and performance, this role will grow—giving you the chance to develop alongside the division.



This isn’t just a basic editing position. We want someone who takes pride in their work, is eager to improve quickly, and is driven to raise the standard of their output.



What You’ll Be Doing

Editing short-form videos for Instagram Reels and

Crafting engaging, high-retention content with strong hooks and smooth pacing

Adding captions, on-screen text, cuts, and simple motion graphics

Following and contributing to a consistent brand style

Required Skills

Solid understanding of storytelling, attention, and viewer retention

Ability to apply feedback effectively and improve with speed

Who This Role Suits

You’re motivated and want to grow beyond basic freelance editing

You care about the quality of your work and strive to improve it

You’re interested in contributing to something long-term, not just completing tasks

You’re excited by responsibility and growing with a team

Role Details

Fully remote, ongoing position

Starts with a focus on short-form content

Potential to move into long-form editing as the division expands

title: Prop Firm Trader (FX / Futures / Crypto)
description:
Hello Traders!



Isla Capital is growing — and we’re looking to bring on disciplined, serious traders to join our team of elite traders.



We work with experienced prop firm traders to trade evaluation and funded accounts through firms such as FTMO, Apex, Alpha Capital Group, and similar platforms.



This opportunity is designed for Filipino professionals who understand prop firm rules, respect risk, and can trade with consistency and control.



This is not a casual trading role — it is a structured, performance-driven environment with a clear path toward higher earnings and long-term growth. Over time, this role will expand into live portfolio trading, where earning potential increases significantly.



What You’ll Do...



• Trade prop firm evaluation (challenge) accounts and funded accounts

• Strictly follow all prop firm rules and drawdown limits

• Maintain daily trading journals

• Provide consistent performance updates



What We’re Looking For...



• Experience trading prop firm accounts

• Strong risk management and discipline

• Ability to work independently

• Honest and reliable communication

• Understanding of scalping and/or day trading strategies



Compensation & Growth...



• Weekly base salary potential

• Bonus for passing evaluations / challenges

• Profit sharing on funded account payouts

• Performance bonuses based on payout milestones

• Access to in-house coaching from experienced traders



Important Notes...



• Accounts must be registered under the trader’s name (per prop firm rules), but all accounts and profits are part of Isla Capital

• All prop firm fees and account costs are fully covered by Isla Capital

• Strict confidentiality is required



Who This Is For...



This is a performance-first opportunity for traders who take their craft seriously.



We are building a system where disciplined Filipino traders can earn meaningful income and grow long-term within a structured trading environment.



If you are consistent, controlled, and committed — this could be a strong fit.



How to Apply...



Please apply and include:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your prop firm experience

• Your trading style and psychology

• Resume or link to resume (if available)



Let's build something serious together!

title: Commercial Lines Insurance Quoter
description:
We are looking for a Commercial Lines Insurance Quoter to assist our agency with quoting and remarketing commercial insurance policies. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, experienced with insurance carrier portals, and comfortable handling various types of commercial risks.



This is a remote position supporting a growing insurance agency.



Responsibilities



* Quote Commercial Auto, General Liability, BOP, Workers’ Compensation, and other commercial policies

* Compare rates across multiple carriers

* Enter and verify client and risk information in quoting systems

* Assist agents with new business quotes and remarketing

* Prepare and present quote comparisons and summaries

* Maintain accurate records of quotes and client information



Requirements



* Minimum of 3 years experience quoting commercial lines insurance

* Familiarity with insurance carrier portals

* Strong attention to detail

* Ability to manage multiple quotes and deadlines

* Organized and reliable



Preferred



* Experience working with US insurance agencies

* Familiarity with carriers such as Progressive, Travelers, The Hartford, Liberty Mutual, etc.

* Experience with agency management systems (AMS / CRM)



Please send your resume to

title: Personal Lines Quoter / P&C Insurance Virtual Assistant
description:
We are a US-based Property & Casualty insurance brokerage looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Virtual Assistant to help our team run personal lines insurance quotes and manage client data.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Run personal auto, home, and renters insurance quotes through carrier portals (e.g., Progressive, Travelers, and others)

- Accurately input client information from dec pages and applications into quoting systems

- Compare rates across carriers and present options clearly

- Follow up on missing information needed to complete quotes

- Maintain organized records of quotes, clients, and policy data

- Communicate with clients and/or the internal team via
 or messaging platforms

- Assist with other general insurance admin tasks as needed



REQUIREMENTS:

- Prior experience in P&C insurance quoting or insurance VA work is strongly preferred

- Familiarity with US personal lines insurance (auto, home, renters)

- Experience with carrier portals or agency management systems is a plus

- Excellent attention to detail and data accuracy

- Strong written English communication skills

- Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, quiet work environment

- Able to work during US business hours (EST or CST)



This is a long-term, full-time remote position. We're looking for someone who is dependable, fast, and committed to growing with our team. If you have insurance experience and want a stable remote job, we want to hear from you!

title: Executive Support Assistant
description:
Chilli Pilates is one of the UK’s fastest-growing boutique fitness brands — 14 studios, a growing team of

instructors, and a mission to make premium Pilates genuinely accessible. We’re building a world-class

remote operations team in the Philippines to power our growth, and we need someone exceptional to join

us.



This role sits at the operational heart of Chilli. You’ll keep instructor data accurate, ensure studios are

stocked and early-morning cover coordination sorted before the UK day begins. You’ll work alongside a

close peer — another Executive Support Assistant — and the two of you will be fully cross-trained so you

can step into each other’s shoes seamlessly. If you love variety, thrive on detail, and want to be part of

something that’s genuinely growing — read on.



What you’ll do

???? Cover Coordination — 6am–9am London time, Mon–Fri

• Monitor cover needs across all Chilli studios every day; reacting to sickness and lateness notifications from the instructors

• Call on available instructors to step in for cover and alert members of any delays or cancellations

• Manage same-day and next-day emergency cover requests

• Ensure the data the cover app uses is accurate

• Hand over clearly to the team at the end of each shift



???? People & Scheduling

• Instructor onboarding admin: system access, onboarding checklists, onboarding coordination across all business areas

• Leaver administration: system updates, leaver checklist, onboarding coordination across all business areas

• Maintain the employee database as the single source of truth

• Update instructor schedules and the cover app; implement changes for leavers, studio openings, and timetable revisions

• Collate and prepare payroll inputs; investigate payroll queries within agreed SLAs

• Holiday credits: process dashboard credits for FT instructors on leave

• Xmas scheduling: coordinate the annual Christmas schedule distribution across all studios

• Support leaders with people-related admin and communicate schedule updates to instructors



???? Facilities & Studio Operations

• Uniform stock management: collate orders, manage stock, send acknowledgements to instructors,

monitor stock levels

• Utility coordination: chase monthly meter readings from all studios, input to tracking sheet, flag

inconsistencies, support renewal processes

• Retail stock management: monitor the stock system for minimum levels, trigger orders and

communicate with our supplier re manufacture and delivery

• Studio stock management: monitor the stock check system for minimum levels, assist in the

coordination of distribution, liaise with stock checkers and deputies

• New studio setup: arrange utility accounts for new openings (electricity, waste, broadband)

• Monthly rates payments coordination and ad hoc facilities projects



???? Sales & Marketing Admin Support

• Run reports for the marketing lead

• Sales and prospect materials: monitor and reorder stock of leaflets and handouts across studios



What we’re looking for

• Available from 6am-9am London time, Monday to Friday — this is non-negotiable

• Experience across operations, HR admin, people coordination, or facilities — ideally more than one

area

• Google Workspace and Sheets native — formulas, filters, and keeping data clean

• Strong written English — clear, professional communication with UK-based staff

• Calm under pressure — the cover shift moves fast and requires good judgement

• High attention to detail — scheduling and data errors have real consequences for studios and

instructors

• A genuine team player — you’ll work hand-in-glove with your peer assistant and be ready to step

into their shoes when needed

• Self-starter who takes ownership without being prompted

• Bonus: experience with Mindbody (MBO) or a similar scheduling platform



Availability:

20–40 hrs/week. This role will begin as part-time and will eventually add hours as we progress. Must be available 6am–9am London time (GMT/BST) Mon–Fri for the cover shift, plus broader availability for admin tasks.

title: Operations & Systems Manager
description:
We are a sign and graphics business based in Australia.  We need someone who can improve our efficiency, organisation, and scalability by developing and implementing better systems and processes.



We are looking for an experienced and skilled Operations & Systems Manager to build and manage the backend of our business.



Your Role:

You will be responsible for creating, improving, and managing all internal systems, workflows, and administrative processes. This is not just basic admin — you will help design how the business runs.



Key Responsibilities:



Build and improve business systems (job tracking, quoting, production workflow)

Create SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) for all tasks

Set up and manage tools such as:

CRM systems

Project management tools (e.g. ClickUp, Trello, Asana)

File organisation systems (Google Drive)

Automate repetitive tasks (using Zapier, Make, etc.)

Organise client information, jobs, and scheduling

Improve workflow efficiency and reduce errors

Assist with general admin tasks when needed

Work directly with the owner to implement ideas



Requirements:



Strong experience in operations, systems, or process development and improvement

Education in business systems/ admin

Experience with tools like ClickUp, Asana, Trello, or similar

Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make/Integromat)

Highly organised and detail-oriented

Strong problem-solving skills

Excellent written and spoken English

Ability to work independently and take initiative



How to Apply:

To apply, please include:



List exact business/ admin education with names and dates of schools.

List exact working experience working specifically developing, implementing, managing business systems and admin with names and dates of employers.

A short introduction about yourself.

Examples of systems or workflows you have created.

A video (2–5 minutes) explaining a system you built or improved.

Your favourite productivity tool and why.



Important: Include the word “SYSTEMS” in your application subject line so we know you read this.



We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with the business and take ownership of operations.





Nice to Have:



Experience working with small businesses.

Experience in manufacturing, printing, or signage industry.

CRM setup experience.

Basic understanding of project workflows.

title: Customer Support
description:
About the Role

Vidrush is seeking a tech-savvy Technical Customer Support Specialist to join our lean, fast-paced team. This isn't just a "copy-paste" support role; you will be responsible for assisting users through technical hurdles, managing our community, and providing hands-on help with video-related issues.



Working Hours

Shift: 12 AM to 4 AM CET (Monday to Friday)



Local Time: 7 AM to 11 AM Philippine Time (PHT)



Total: 20 hours/week



Our Tech Stack

Support: Crisp (Chat & User Management)



Community: 



Billing: Stripe



Internal Comm: Slack & WhatsApp



Key Responsibilities

Active Support: Manage live chats and user concerns via Crisp.



Technical Troubleshooting: Diagnose platform issues and investigate billing/subscription queries via Stripe.



Community Support: Act as the primary point of contact for technical questions in our 
 server.



Video Assistance: Provide "hands-on" help with re-rendering videos or replacing media/templates when users encounter errors.



Requirements:

SaaS Experience: Proven experience with Crisp, Stripe, or similar SaaS-based support tools.




 Mastery: Ability to manage threads, support roles, and community interactions smoothly.



Critical Thinker: You can diagnose why a process (like a video render) is failing and find a creative workaround.



English Fluency: Excellent written English skills for professional, clear communication.



Nice to Haves:

Basic Video Editing: Familiarity with video editing software (e.g., Premiere, CapCut, or web-based editors) to swap media or adjust templates.

title: All-in-One Digital Marketing Specialist (Manila Interviews Early May)
description:
ob Type: Part-Time / Project-Based (Rapidly building into a Permanent Role)

Salary: Competitive – Negotiable based on multi-skill expertise

Company: Australian Institute of Marketing Dynamics (AIMD)



About the Role

Are you a "Jack or Jill of all trades" when it comes to digital marketing? AIMD is seeking a versatile Digital Marketing Specialist who can handle everything from graphic design and content writing to SEO and social media management.



We aren't looking for a specialist who stays in one lane; we want a creative and technical partner to help grow the AIMD brand and support our clients. This role begins on a per-project/gig basis to establish our workflow, with the intent to transition into a permanent, core tea
mber as we scale.



Important: Our CEO is traveling to Manila in early May and will be conducting final-round interviews in person.



What You’ll Be Doing

Creative: Designing high-quality marketing collateral (Canva/Adobe) and writing sharp, engaging copy for blogs and
s.



Social: Managing and growing our social media presence (predominantly 
 and
) including scheduling and community engagement.



Technical: Executing SEO strategies (on-page, keyword research, and basic technical audits) to keep us ranking high.



Strategy: Coordinating across all three areas to ensure our digital footprint is consistent and professional.

Portfolio: A diverse portfolio showing design work, writing samples, and SEO results.



Tools: Mastery of Canva, WordPress, SEO tools (Ahrefs/SEMrush), and Social Media scheduling platforms.



Communication: Exceptional English skills—both written and verbal.



Availability: Must be available for an in-person interview in Manila during the first week of May 2026.



Why Join the AIMD Team?

Direct Path to Permanent: We are looking for a foundation member of our Manila team.



Variety: No two days will be the same—you'll be involved in every facet of the business.



Mentorship: Work directly with Australian business consultants and industry leaders.

Your initial "per gig" or hourly rate expectations.

title: Web Designer & Programmer (WordPress + HTML) – Project-Based
description:
Partner with AIMD (Australian Institute of Marketing Dynamics)



The Opportunity

Are you a "better than just good" developer who can blend high-end style with technical precision?



AIMD (
) is expanding its digital services for SME businesses across regional Australia. We are looking for a reliable, elite-level Web Designer/Programmer to join our production pipeline for 2026.



We market essential marketing services to small and medium enterprises. As our volume increases throughout 2026, we need a dedicated partner who can handle consistent, high-quality website builds on a per-project basis.



What We Are Looking For

We don’t just need someone who can "install a theme." We need a technical partner who understands the balance between aesthetic impact and functional performance.



WordPress Mastery: Deep knowledge of the WP ecosystem, including custom themes, page builders (Elementor/Divi), and plugin integration.



Front-End Fluency: Strong HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript skills for when "out of the box" isn't good enough.



Design Eye: Ability to create clean, modern, and professional layouts that reflect a high-end brand identity.



SME Focused: Understanding how to build sites that convert for small-to-medium businesses (fast load times, mobile-first, clear CTAs).



Reliability: You are organized, meet deadlines without hand-holding, and communicate clearly.



Role Details & Workflow

Engagement: Project-based / Freelance.



The Pipeline: You will be our go-to developer for new client website builds as they enter our system.



Scope: End-to-end development, from initial design/wireframing to final deployment and hand-over.



Growth: We are scaling fast; for the right partner, this will lead to a consistent, high-volume flow of work throughout 2026.



Requirements

A portfolio showcasing high-end, responsive WordPress websites.



Proven experience in custom HTML/CSS coding.



Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

title: Graphic Designer & Content Writer (Project-to-Permanent) – Interviewing in Manila May 2026
description:
Job Type: Part-Time / Project-Based (Leading to Full-Time)

Salary: Competitive Per-Gig Rate (Negotiable based on experience)

Company: Australian Institute of Marketing Dynamics (AIMD)



About the Role

AIMD is expanding, and we are looking for a creative powerhouse who can bridge the gap between visual design and compelling copy. This role starts as a "per gig" arrangement to ensure we are a perfect fit for each other, with the explicit goal of moving into a permanent, full-time position as our workload continues to scale.



The best part? Our CEO will be in Manila in early May to conduct face-to-face interviews and select the foundation members of our Manila creative team.



What You’ll Be Doing

Graphic Design: Creating high-impact social media tiles, slide decks, and marketing collateral that align with the AIMD brand.



Content Writing: Crafting engaging captions, short-form blogs, and
 marketing copy that speaks to business owners.

Communication: Excellent written and spoken English.



Availability: Ready to take on projects immediately and available for an in-person interview in Manila during the first week of May.



Why Join AIMD?

Growth Path: We don't just want a freelancer; we want a long-term tea
mber.



Stability: Transition from gig-work to a stable, permanent role with an established Australian company.



Direct Mentorship: Work closely with industry experts and build your professional profile.



How to Apply

Please send your resume and a link to your portfolio. In your cover letter, tell us:



Your experience balancing both design and writing.



Your "per project" or hourly expectations for the initial phase.



Confirmation that you are available for an interview in Manila in early May.

title: Sales Manager (Outbound Campaigns)
description:
This is a high-ownership, performance-driven role.



You will be responsible for ensuring that:

Callers are trained properly

Calls are monitored daily

Campaigns are performing

Qualified leads (CDQLs) are consistently generated



This role sits at the core of execution — if campaigns succeed, it is because of you.



Key Responsibilities



Caller Training & Onboarding

Ensure all new callers complete training within the first 2 days

Conduct daily onboarding discussions to assess:

Campaign understanding

ICP clarity

CDQL qualification

Ensure callers understand how to structure their day to meet KPI



2. Daily Call Monitoring & Quality Control

Listen to call recordings for every caller, every day



Review:

Handover calls (for leads produced)

Minimum 5 calls for non-performing callers



Evaluate:

Conversation quality

Gatekeeper navigation

Qualification approach

Effort vs outcome



If calls are not being reviewed, the role is not being executed.



3. Caller Coaching & Performance Improvement

Conduct regular 1-on-1 coaching sessions

Use real call recordings for feedback



Help callers improve:

Openings

Listening skills

Objection handling

Qualification

Track improvement over time



4. Campaign Performance Management



Ensure each caller works toward:

1 CDQL per day (attended meeting)

Identify:

Campaign risks

Performance gaps

Behavioral issues

Drive corrective actions quickly



5. Performance Monitoring & Documentation

Maintain daily monitoring sheets for all callers

Classify callers based on performance:

Performing

Needs training



At risk

Document:

Call audits

Coaching actions

Performance trends



6. Accountability & Escalation

Identify low performers early

Take structured action:

Coaching ? Observation ? PIP

If no improvement within defined timelines:

 Initiate Performance Improvement Plan



7. Weekly Performance Reviews

Run weekly team calls with all callers

Present performance scoreboard:

Calls

Conversations

Meetings

CDQLs

Highlight gaps and improvement areas

Encourage learning from top performers



8. New Caller Evaluation (2-Week Review)

Evaluate every new caller after 2 weeks of dialing

If no CDQL is achieved:

title: Legal Lawyer For Social Media Company
description:
Legal Counsel / In-House Lawyer



Company: Grove London

Location: Remote / Hybrid

Employment Type: Full-Time

Start Date: Immediate

Role Overview



Grove London is seeking a highly skilled and commercially minded Legal Counsel to oversee all legal aspects of the business. This role is critical in protecting the company’s interests, ensuring compliance, and supporting rapid growth within the social media marketing and influencer space.



The ideal candidate will have strong experience in contract law, digital media, and employment law, along with the ability to act decisively in high-pressure situations.



Key Responsibilities



1. Contract Management & Legal Documentation

Draft, review, and negotiate a wide range of agreements, including:

Client service agreements

Influencer and creator contracts

Brand partnership agreements

Supplier and vendor contracts

Develop, implement, and maintain standardized legal templates across the business

Ensure all agreements align with company strategy and mitigate legal risk



2. Influencer & Talent Legal Oversight

Create and manage influencer agreements, ensuring clarity on deliverables, usage rights, exclusivity, and payment terms

Advise on advertising compliance (e.g. disclosure requirements, platform policies)

Handle disputes between influencers, clients, and the company



3. Employment Law & Internal Protection

Draft and enforce employment agreements, including:

Confidentiality clauses (NDAs)

Non-compete and non-solicitation agreements



Ensure employees are legally restricted from using or sharing proprietary company information

Advise leadership on HR-related legal matters and employee disputes



4. Business Legal Advisory

Act as the primary legal advisor to leadership on all business decisions

Identify potential legal risks and provide proactive solutions

Ensure compliance with relevant laws and regulations across all operating markets





5. Crisis Management & Dispute Resolution

Lead legal strategy during crises (e.g. contract breaches, public disputes, influencer issues, reputational risks)

Manage legal disputes, claims, and potential litigation

Provide rapid, clear guidance in high-pressure situations to protect the brand



Additional Responsibilities (Social Media Marketing Focus)



Advise on intellectual property rights, including content ownership, licensing, and usage rights



Ensure compliance with digital advertising laws, influencer marketing regulations, and platform-specific rules (e.g. Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)



Oversee data protection and privacy compliance (e.g. GDPR and global equivalents)



Review and approve marketing campaigns from a legal perspective



Support international expansion with cross-border legal considerations



Monitor and adapt to evolving regulations in the creator economy



Establish policies for content usage, brand representation, and online conduct



Ideal Candidate



Proactive, strategic thinker who can anticipate legal challenges before they arise



Comfortable operating as both a legal advisor and business partner

Highly detail-oriented with strong commercial awareness



Able to handle sensitive situations with discretion and professionalism



Calm under pressure and capable of leading during crisis situations

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Executive Assistant to Director of Operations

We are looking for a sharp, high-agency Executive Assistant to support our Director of Operations in a fast-growing company.

About the Role

This is a high-level support position focused on accountability, process improvement, and pipeline performance. You will not handle basic administrative tasks. Instead, you will help enforce standards, drive results, and ensure our front-office pipeline runs smoothly and efficiently.

Key Responsibilities



Support enforcement of accountability across Recruiting Coordinators, Onboarding Coordinators, Marketing Intake Specialists, and Tech Support Specialists.

Help monitor and improve key conversion rates (doc submission success, offer letter signing, rapid booking, etc.).

Assist in identifying and eliminating bottlenecks in our client recruitment and onboarding pipeline.

Support efforts to deliver ~80 qualified gig workers per week to the Quant department.

Help create and refine Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and improve data tracking.

Provide upward feedback from deep in the pipeline to continuously improve client quality and experience.

Assist with process discipline, performance standards, and hard conversations.

Help oversee payroll, device supply chain (iPhones), and cost control while scaling output.

Support hiring and talent identification for front-office roles.



What We’re Looking For



Highly intelligent, quick-thinking, and responsive individual who can keep up with sharp senior executives.

Strong ability to instill accountability and maintain high standards in a remote team.

Experience managing or supporting entry-level remote teams (ideally 15–20+ people).

Excellent at building processes, measuring outcomes, and driving continuous improvement.

Comfortable supporting difficult conversations and performance management.



Compensation & Structure

This is a full-time remote role with a clear path to grow into the full Director of Operations position.

This is a high-impact role in a rapidly growing company (front office expanded from 1 to ~20 people in 16 months). You will work closely with leadership to keep the client pipeline flowing and the business scaling efficiently.

How to Apply

Send an
 to 
 with the subject line: “Executive Assistant Application”

Please include:



Your resume (PDF format only)

Any relevant university/college transcript

Any relevant national testing results (optional)



In your
, please answer this question:

“Why are you suitable for this Executive Assistant role? Please highlight any previous experience.”

Note: The quality of your formatting, clarity, and attention to detail in this
 will be a key factor in whether you are selected for an interview.

title: Remote Lead Generation / Business Development (Fintech Payments)
description:
Remote Lead Generation / Business Development Associate – Fintech Payments



Remote | Full-time or Part-time



We are a cross-border payment company working with digital merchants in Southeast Asia.



Our main clients include:



• Online gaming platforms

• Forex & trading companies

• High-frequency digital businesses



We are expanding our merchant acquisition team and looking for motivated individuals who enjoy research, outreach, and building new business connections.



Role Overview



As a Lead Generation / Business Development Associate, your main responsibility is to identify potential merchants and connect with the decision makers of online platforms.



Your goal is to introduce our payment solutions and move merchants toward the API testing stage.



You will focus mainly on merchant sourcing, outreach, and early-stage communication.



Your Responsibilities



Your daily work may include:



• Research online gaming or trading websites targeting Indonesia or India

• Identify websites with active payment or deposit systems

• Find
, WhatsApp,
, or other direct contact of the operator or decision maker

• Send the first outreach message introducing our payment solution

• Record leads and contact details in a shared Google Sheet

• Introduce interested merchants into group communication with the PAYJN team

• Assist merchants in moving toward the API onboarding and test transaction stage



Most merchants in this industry communicate via
, so the ability to find and reach operators on
 is very important.



What Counts as a Valid Merchant



A merchant will be considered valid when:



• You connect with a real decision maker or operator

• The merchant shows interest in exploring payment cooperation

• API onboarding is initiated

• At least one successful test transaction is completed



The API test stage is the main milestone for BD performance.



Required Lead Information



For each potential merchant, you should try to collect:



• Website link

• Screenshot of deposit/payment page

•
 / WhatsApp /
 contact

• Name or role of the operator (if available)



Leads without contact information will normally not be considered valid.



Pricing & Commercial Authority



You are responsible for introducing our services and initiating conversations.



However, you are NOT required to:



• Sign contracts

• Approve special pricing

• Make final commercial decisions



The company management team will handle pricing approvals and final agreements.



Compensation Structure



Base Salary

USD $400 per month



Base salary applies as long as at least one merchant reaches the API test stage in a month.



Commission



• 0.02% of transaction volume fro
rchants you introduce

• Commission valid for 6 months per merchant

• No commission cap



Example



If a merchant processes:



Average daily volume: $150,000



Monthly volume ? $4.5 million



0.02% commission ? $900 per month



Multiple merchants can significantly increase total income.



Work Structure



This role can be:



• Full-time

• Part-time



There are no fixed working hours, but consistent outreach and merchant sourcing activity are expected.



Ideal Candidate



• Experience in lead generation, sales, or business development

• Comfortable initiating conversations with potential merchants

• Familiar with
, WhatsApp, or online outreach tools

• Able to research and identify real online businesses

• Self-motivated and performance-driven

• Interested in long-term income growth through commission



Application Questions



Please answer the following when applying:



Have you worked in lead generation or business development before?



How would you identify if an online gaming website is real and active?



How many hours per day can you consistently dedicate to this role?



Are you comfortable completing a short research task within 48 hours?



Applications without answers may not be reviewed.

title: Expert PDF Editor / Document Specialist (High Precision)
description:
Overview

We are seeking an extremely detail-oriented PDF Specialist to assist with complex document editing. This is not a basic data entry role. You will be responsible for modifying PDF documents, often without access to original source files, to produce professional, seamless results that are indistinguishable from the originals.



If you are the type of person who is bothered by a font being slightly off or a line being misaligned by a single pixel, this is the role for you. We have a consistent stream of tasks for someone who prides themselves on "pixel-perfect" execution.



Key Responsibilities

Advanced PDF Editing: Modify text, layout, and graphics within PDF files using Adobe Acrobat Pro and other advanced tools.



Visual Matching: Replicate fonts, kerning, spacing, and formatting exactly to ensure edited sections are identical to the original document.



Quality Assurance: Perform rigorous self-checks to ensure zero discrepancies in alignment, font weight, or color.



Document Reconstruction: Recreate elements in flattened documents to maintain a professional, "native" look.



Required Qualifications

Expert Level Adobe Acrobat Pro: Comprehensive knowledge of the software is non-negotiable.



Design Literacy: Proficiency in Photoshop or Illustrator to recreate complex document elements when necessary.



Keen Eye for Detail: You must be able to spot inconsistencies that others miss.



Technical Independence: Ability to produce high-quality work without needing a source file (Word, InDesign, etc.).



Work Details

Location: Remote (Philippines).



Schedule: Open to Part-Time or Full-Time.



Compensation: Competitive; based on expertise and speed.



How to Apply

To ensure you have read this entire post and are as detail-oriented as we require, you must follow these instructions exactly:



Send an
 to 
 Line: Must start with the word "Obsessive" followed by your name (e.g., Obsessive - Juan Dela Cruz).



The First Line of your
: Must state exactly which version of Adobe Acrobat you are currently using.



The Last Line of your
: Must include the word "Cinnabar".



Please include:

Your resume (PDF format only)

Any relevant university/college transcript

Any relevant national testing results (optional)

A brief summary of your experience with high-precision PDF editing including what tools you're experienced with.

Your availability and desired hourly rate.



Applications that do not follow the subject line and keyword instructions will be discarded immediately.

title: Videographer
description:
About Disruptiv Ltd



Disruptiv Ltd is a digital marketing agency supporting clients across SEO, PPC, content, and creative. We’re hiring a videographer who can move fast using AI, producing high-quality short-form video content at scale for marketing campaigns.



The Role



This is not a traditional videographer role.



We need someone who can combine video editing + AI-assisted production to deliver content quickly, consistently, and at scale.



Speed, organisation, and reliability are just as important as creative ability.



What you’ll do

Create short-form video content for social (organic + ads): hooks, cutdowns, captions, pacing

Produce multiple variations of videos (different hooks, formats, CTAs)

Use AI tools to speed up editing, scripting, captioning, and repurposing

Turn around content quickly while maintaining quality

Create simple motion graphics, overlays, and branded video formats

Build repeatable workflows (templates, prompts, editing systems)

Keep projects organised (file naming, version control, source-of-truth folders)

Provide clear status updates in our project system (e.g. Asana)

QA everything before delivery (timing, captions, formatting, brand consistency)

You’ll be a fit if you…

Have strong video editing skills for short-form content

Are fast and efficient — you can turn around content quickly

Are confident using AI tools to speed up video production

Have experience creating content for ads and social media

Think in systems (templates, repeatable workflows, scalable output)

Are reliable and organised — you communicate clearly and don’t need chasing

Understand performance creative basics (hook, pacing, retention, CTA, testing mindset)

AI focus (must-have)



We are specifically looking for someone who:



Uses AI tools to increase speed and output (not just experimenting)

Can quickly generate and iterate video content using AI

Uses AI for scripting, captions, editing, or repurposing

Understands how to balance speed with quality

Tools (examples — you can recommend your own stack)

CapCut / Premiere Pro / Final Cut / After Effects

AI tools for video editing, captions, scripting, or repurposing

Bonus: tools for voice, dubbing, cleanup, upscaling, background removal

Output examples we expect

15–30s short-form edits (UGC-style, founder-led, promo cutdowns)

Hook variations and ad creatives

Captioned videos optimised for social platforms

Repeatable templates for scaling content

Working style

Remote-first, async-friendly

Weekly priorities + clear deadlines

Fast iterations with feedback loops

We care about speed, consistency, and visible progress updates

Contract / hours



Part-time or contract to start (with scope to increase)



Paid hourly or per agreed scope (based on experience and speed)



Application Question(s)

What tools do you use to edit videos?

How many years of experience do you have in videography/video editing?

Do you have experience creating short-form content for ads or social?

Please share 2 examples of your video work

What AI tools do you use in your workflow, and how do they help you deliver content faster

title: Seeking Experts for Feedback:Bilingual Parents, and Sport Enthusiasts (NFL amaerican football Book Focus)
description:
Looking for Beta Readers: "The Inspiring NFL Stories For Kids"



Hello!!!



We’re a growing educational publishing team at Petite Dreamer, creating "human-crafted," engaging books for children—especially those in multilingual and multicultural families who may find traditional books boring. Right now, we’re looking for thoughtful experts and beta readers to provide detailed feedback on our newest title: "The Inspiring NFL Stories For Kids: 24 Epic Tales of Grit".



We are especially interested in those with a passion for NFL, any sports and personal or professional experience in coaching, sports education, or children's literature.



About the Book:



Beyond the Stats: Unlike typical sports books that focus on dry numbers, this book focuses on "Grit"—the failures, heartbreaks, and the "4 AM" workouts that make a champion.



Epic Tales of Grit: Features 24 stories of NFL G.O.A.T.s, including Kobe Bryant’s "Mamba Mentality," Larry Bird’s early morning repetitions, and Michael Jordan's "Breakfast Club".



Engaging Format: Includes 100+ facts, trivia, "Grit Checks," and interactive quizzes designed to grab the attention of reluctant readers.



Multilingual Support: Written to support bilingual/multilingual households and encourage "Future Legends" at home.



We’re looking for someone who:



Has experience writing professional feedback or editorial content for children's books.



Can provide constructive insights that resonate with parents, educators, and young sports fans.



Understands the value of resilience-based non-fiction for kids.



Has experience as a teacher, bilingual parent, or a deep background in the Sport niche (coach, player, or super-fan).



Bonus if you:



Have personal experience teaching or parenting bilingual children.



Have written or edited children’s sports books or educational non-fiction.



Are familiar with the "Mamba Mentality" or the history of Sport, Football(NFL) legends.



What You’ll Get:



A full PDF copy of the book in advance.



An opportunity to join our growing team of collaborators (with potential future projects across stories, facts, trivia books, and more).



How to Apply:

Please send a brief summary of your experience with Sport and children’s education/literature. Mention if you are a bilingual parent or educator!

Candidate Profile:

 This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a dynamic, high-growth environment and is willing to go beyond standard expectations when needed

title: Knowledge Base & Data Organization Specialist (Remote)

title: Appointment setter — outbound sales (websites & AI receptionist)
description:
Booked AI helps businesses grow with professional websites and AI-powered receptionists that handle calls, book appointments, and capture leads — 24/7, without hiring extra staff. We're expanding fast and need driven appointment setters to get us in front of the right business owners



What to do

Research and build lead lists of local businesses that would benefit from a website or AI receptionist

Make outbound cold calls and send follow-up messages to business owners and decision makers

Pitch the value of our services in a clear, friendly, and confident way

Book qualified discovery calls or demos directly into our calendar

Track your outreach activity and results in a shared CRM or spreadsheet

Meet daily/weekly targets for calls made and appointments set.



What we're looking for

At least 1 year of experience in cold calling, appointment setting, or outbound sales — B2B preferred

Excellent spoken and written English — confident, clear, and professional on the phone

Not afraid of rejection — you stay positive and keep dialing

Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and hit targets

Basic computer skills — Google Sheets, Zoom, CRM tools (training provided)

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace for calls



Nice to have

Experience selling digital services (websites, SEO, software, or SaaS)

Familiarity with AI tools or tech products

Experience with US, UK, Australian, or Canadian clients



How to apply

To be considered, please send the following when you apply:



A brief intro about your outbound sales experience

A voice recording (Vocaroo or Loom) of a 30-second cold call introduction — imagine you're calling a small business owner to sell them a website

Your available hours and preferred timezone

Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed. We want to hear your voice!



How you get paid

Small base — $2–$3/hr

Just enough to keep the lights on while you ramp up. This is not where the money is.

$5 per qualified appointment booked

Every confirmed call you book with a real decision maker pays $5. Book 3 per day = $75 extra/week on top of base.

Bonus when your appointment closes a deal

Website deal closes ? +$25 bonus. AI receptionist deal closes ? +$50–$75 bonus. You get paid when we get paid.



What a strong week looks like

20 hrs worked

Base: ~$50

15 appts booked

Appt bonus: $75

3 deals close

Close bonus: $100+

Week total

~$225+ for 20 hrs

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (Fluent English Required) – Base + Performance Pay
description:
Overview:

We are a U.S.-based AI automation agency helping local businesses capture missed calls and turn them into booked appointments automatically.



We are hiring a results-driven cold caller / appointment setter whose ONLY job is to generate booked appointments.



If you are not comfortable calling businesses daily and handling rejection, do NOT apply.



Compensation:



Base Pay: $400/month

$10–$30 per booked appointment

$50–$200 per closed deal



Top performers can earn significantly more. This is a performance-based role.



Your Role (What You Will Actually Do):



Call U.S. local businesses (leads provided daily)

Speak directly with business owners or decision-makers

Follow a script while sounding natural and confident

Handle objections and keep conversations moving

Book qualified appointments on our calendar

Log all activity in CRM after each call



Daily Expectations:



50–100+ outbound calls per day

Consistent follow-ups with leads

Minimum: 1 booked appointment per week

Target: 3–5+ booked appointments per week



Failure to meet minimum performance will result in replacement.



Required Skills (Do NOT apply if you don’t meet these):



Fluent, clear English with strong speaking ability

Proven cold calling or appointment setting experience

Confident handling objections (not afraid of rejection)

High energy and ability to control conversations

Reliable internet + quiet working environment

Ability to work consistently and hit daily targets



Preferred (Strong Advantage):



Experience calling U.S. businesses

Sales or closing experience

Experience in home services, med spas, or local businesses



How to Apply (MANDATORY – Applications without this will be ignored):



Send a 30–60 second voice recording introducing yourself

Answer: How many calls per day have you handled before?

Record yourself reading this script:



“Hi, is this the owner?

Quick question — are you currently handling missed calls and bookings manually, or do you have a system in place for that?”



Record yourself responding to this objection:



“We’re not interested.”



Important:

This is a performance role, not a passive job.

We are looking for someone who wants to grow, earn more through commissions, and stay long-term.



If you can consistently produce results, there is opportunity for higher pay and leadership roles.



Apply only if you are confident on the phone and ready to perform.

title: Pacific Admin Solutions Social Media & Growth VA - Pickleball App
description:
Social Media & Growth VA – Pickleball App



Young, Scrappy Content & Community Manager Needed for Fast-Growing Pickleball App



Do you want to help a pickleball Apple Watch app blow up on TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit?



Then let's talk.



Don't miss this.

-Get in on the ground floor of a growing sports tech app with real 
ntum

-Work directly alongside the founder — your impact will be immediate and visible

-Big opportunities for the right person as the app scales

-Long-term position with a clear path from part-time to full-time

-Be trained and shaped by someone who knows how to grow apps

-Work from home, on your own terms

-Real creative ownership — this isn't just posting, it's building something



We built an Apple Watch app specifically for pickleball players to track their games, stats, and progress. Pickleball is one of the fastest-growing sports in the US — and we're building the go-to tool for players who take their game seriously.



We want you to play a huge role in helping us grow. This is an exciting long-term opportunity, and as you grow, the role can grow with you.



So, are you ready?



JOB OVERVIEW

Main Responsibilities and Skills Needed:

-TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit content posting and community engagement

-Engagement farming — creating and distributing content designed to drive likes, comments, shares, and saves

-Organic community outreach and messaging across social platforms

-Supporting AI-based marketing automations (tools and training provided)

-Staying current on pickleball trends, viral content, and platform algorithm changes

-Tech savvy — comfortable learning new tools quickly

-Solid written English — natural, conversational, native-sounding



Here are specific examples of what you'll be handling week to week:

-Post and manage content on TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit accounts

-Engage with the pickleball community — comment on posts, respond to DMs, join conversations

-Conduct direct outreach via DM to pickleball content creators and active players

-Monitor and participate in Reddit pickleball communities (r/pickleball, etc.)

-Flag trending content and 
nts in the pickleball world to capitalize on

-Support and maintain AI automation workflows

-Report weekly on what's working, what's not, and what to try next



DESCRIPTION OF IDEAL CANDIDATE

Young and Social Media Native

You grew up on TikTok and Instagram. You understand how content moves, what makes people stop scrolling, and how communities actually talk to each other. You don't need to be told what's trending — you already know.



AI-Fluent, Not AI-Dependent

You know how to use AI tools to work faster and smarter — whether that's for research, scheduling, automation, or ideation. But you also know the difference between content that feels human and content that screams "AI wrote this." We have zero tolerance for AI slop. If you use AI, it's a tool, not a ghostwriter.



Gets Stuff Done

You take charge and make things happen. You don't make excuses. You have an internal drive to grow something and you'll do whatever it takes.



Self Starter

You're self-motivated and happy working independently. You don't sit around waiting to be told what to do next.



Creative

You have an eye for what will resonate with an audience. You know the difference between content that flops and content that hits — and you're always thinking about how to make the next post better than the last.



Solves Problems

When something isn't working, you figure out why and try something different. You don't wait to be told.



Takes Ownership

You love having responsibility. You want to be the person who makes something succeed.



Growth-Minded

You're always learning. You stay on top of platform changes, new tools, and what's working in the social media space right now.



You Do What You Say

If you commit to something, you follow through. Simple as that.



COMPANY CULTURE

We're direct and transparent. We work hard, move fast, and have fun doing it. You'll work closely with the founder — communication is open and feedback is immediate. If something isn't working, we talk about it and fix it.



PAY

200–250 PHP per hour, based on ability and experience. Part-time (~10 hours/week) to start, with a direct path to full-time based on results. If you believe you have more to offer, tell us what you'd like and why.



CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS

-Honest and reliable

-Strong written English — natural, conversational tone

-Actively uses TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit personally (not just professionally)

-Comfortable with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, automation platforms, etc.) — but creates original, human-feeling content

-Own computer with reliable internet connection

-Comfortable with video calls during late US Pacific Time hours



Working Hours

Part-time (~10 hours/week). Preferred overlap with late US Pacific Time (evenings PST / mornings PHT).



HOW TO APPLY

Message a short cover letter + resume as a response to this job post.



To apply, start your cover letter and your onlinejobs.ph message response header with: "Pickleball Ready"



Also please send a short video (2 minutes max, Loom or YouTube link) introducing yourself and telling us: what's one piece of content you've seen recently that you thought was genius, and why? No templates — make it personal.



We look forward to working with you.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Hiring!



We’re a growing retail and fitness-focused business looking for a detail-oriented Graphic Designer to support high-volume creative production across digital ads and print materials. This is a part-time remote role (20 hours per week), ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, execution-focused environment.



What You’ll Do:



- Design high-performing Meta ad creatives (static and motion) based on provided briefs

- Produce print-ready materials (flyers, posters, signage, gift cards, and more)

- Create multiple design variations and resize assets across different formats

- Develop motion graphics and perform basic video editing

- Ensure all outputs meet digital and print specifications while maintaining brand consistency



Tools You’ll Use:



- Adobe InDesign, Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, and Premiere Pro (or equivalent)

- Meta Ads Platform (design requirements & formats)

- Print Production Tools/Processes

- Canva



What We’re Looking For:



- 3–5 years of graphic design experience (digital ads and print production)

- Strong attention to detail and ability to follow structured briefs

- Experience working in high-volume, fast-paced environments

- Good understanding of ad creatives, layouts, and print specifications



Apply now and work directly with a supportive, hands-on business where your creativity and precision are valued.

title: Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Amazon & E-Commerce Manager
description:
Amazon & Ecommerce Manager — MySweetSmile (Remote, Full-Time)



ABOUT US



MySweetSmile is an award-winning teeth whitening and oral care brand with over 1,000,000 customers globally. We're the UK's #1 teeth whitening brand (The Independent, 2023 & 2024), sold across Amazon UK, US, and EU, Shopify, TikTok Shop, and multiple retail marketplaces. We're growing fast and need someone to own our marketplace operations full-time.



THE ROLE



You'll be the person who lives inside our Amazon accounts and marketplace platforms every single day. Your job is to ensure every listing, every market, and every backend detail is optimised, accurate, and up to date — so the founder doesn't have to.

This is not a VA role. This is full ownership of marketplace operations across multiple platforms and countries.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Amazon (Primary — 50% of role)

- Listing management across UK, US, DE, FR, ES, IT, NL, SE, PL — titles, bullet points, descriptions, backend keywords, search terms, product categories

- A+ Content creation, Brand Story updates, and image gallery management

- Flat file uploads and feed file management

- Listing experiments (A/B testing titles, images, bullets)

- Promotions setup and management (coupons, deals, Brand Tailored Promotions)

- Backend compliance: ingredients, directions for use, safety warnings, category accuracy

- Translations and localisation for EU marketplaces (using AI tools is expected)

- Keeping all marketplaces aligned to a universal standard set by the founder



New Product Launches & Marketplace Expansion (15% of role)

- End-to-end listing creation for new MySweetSmile products across all active marketplaces — content, A+ pages, compliance, and go-live readiness

- Facilitating new marketplace launches as we expand into UAE, Saudi Arabia, Japan, Singapore, and beyond — account setup, listing creation, marketplace-specific requirements, and ensuring all content meets local standards

- Working with the founder and operations team to coordinate launch timelines



Other Marketplaces (10% of role)

- TikTok Shop listing & store management

- Superdrug, Debenhams, OnBuy, and other retail marketplace listings

- Ensuring product data, imagery, and pricing is consistent across all channels



Inventory & Stock Coordination (10% of role)

- Monitoring FBA stock levels daily across all marketplaces

- Flagging restock requirements to the operations team before stockouts occur

- Coordinating on inbound shipment timelines and inventory planning

- Tracking stock positions across non-Amazon channels



Reporting & Competitor Monitoring (10% of role)

- Weekly marketplace performance report summarising sales, stock levels, and key metrics across all channels

- Reviewing advertising agency performance and flagging concerns to the founder

- Weekly competitor monitoring — tracking pricing, listing changes, and new product activity in our category



Creative & Design (5% of role)

- A+ Content design and image gallery creation in Canva

- Updating lifestyle and product imagery across listings

- Graphic design for marketplace-specific assets



WHAT YOU MUST HAVE — NON-NEGOTIABLE



If you don't have all of the following, this role is not for you.



- 3+ years of hands-on Amazon Seller Central experience — you know flat files, backend fields, feed management, and catalogue operations inside out. Not just UI editing.

- Experience managing listings across at least 5 Amazon marketplaces

- Experience launching products on new Amazon marketplaces (especially UAE, JP, SA, SG, AU)

- Confident with A+ Content, Brand Registry, and Brand Story creation

- Confident with Canva or similar design tools for A+ content, image galleries, and basic graphic design

- Experience with TikTok Shop or other non-Amazon marketplace platforms

- Experience with Shopify (product page updates, imagery, descriptions, pricing)

- Experience with Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar Amazon tools

- Basic understanding of Amazon PPC — enough to review an agency's performance, flag issues, and ask the right questions

- Experience with European marketplace translations and localisation

- Experience using AI tools (Claude, etc.) for copywriting, translations, and productivity — this is how we work and you'll be expected to use them daily

- Amazon compliance knowledge: ingredients, origin documentation, safety warnings, category requirements

- Strong written English

- Self-starter who takes full ownership and doesn't wait to be told what to do

- Detail-obsessed — you spot a wrong bullet point, a missing keyword, or an incorrect category and it bothers you



TOOLS WE USE

-Amazon Seller Central (global), Canva, Shopify, Notion, Slack, Google Sheets, Google Drive, Helium 10, AI tools (Claude)



SCHEDULE



Flexible within UK business hours overlap. We need at least 4–5 hours of crossover with UK time (GMT/BST) daily. Full-time, 50 hours per week, 6 days (1 fixed day off).



COMPENSATION



Depending on experience. Long-term role with room to grow as the brand scales into new markets and product lines.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



- You only know basic VA-level Amazon tasks

- You've never worked with flat files or feed management

- You don't have marketplace expansion experience

- You can't design A+ content or work in Canva

- You need hand-holding or frequent check-ins

- You've never used AI tools for productivity

- You can't work independently across time zones

- You want a regular 9-5. 



HOW TO APPLY



Title your application: "MSS Amazon & Ecommerce Manager — [Your Name]"



Include:

- A short intro (3–4 sentences) on why you're the right fit

- A link to a Google Sheet or Doc showing your Amazon marketplace experience — specifically which marketplaces you've managed, what tasks you handled, and any results you achieved

- One example of A+ Content or an Amazon listing you've optimised (screenshot or link)



Applications that don't follow these specific steps will not be reviewed.
