title: SPA BOOKINGS & CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE COORDINATOR
description:
This role is best suited to someone with strong experience in customer communication, bookings coordination, and detail-focused support work - not to a generalist virtual assistant or a pure social media manager.



ABOUT THE COMPANY



We are a growing business in the premium wellness, spa, and lifestyle experience sector, offering curated spa treatments, wellness packages, and giftable experiences through a network of partner venues.



Our business combines bookings, customer experience, partner coordination, CRM management, and digital marketing support. We help customers discover and book high-quality wellness experiences, while working closely with spa and hospitality partners to ensure a smooth and professional service from enquiry to confirmation.



We are now looking for a highly organised and proactive Spa Bookings & Customer Experience Coordinator to support daily operations, customer communication, and selected marketing tasks.



This is a full-time remote role based in the Philippines, working closely with the Director and supporting a business operating in the premium wellness and experience space.



SPA BOOKINGS & CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE COORDINATOR



(Bookings / Customer Support / Partner Coordination / CRM / Marketing Support)



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Bookings & Partner Coordination



• Manage customer bookings and coordinate with spa and wellness partners

• Ensure booking details are accurate, complete, and properly followed up

• Track confirmations, amendments, cancellations, and special requests

• Help ensure customers receive a smooth and professional booking experience

• Support day-to-day coordination with partners to avoid delays, miscommunication, or missed details



Customer Experience & Support



• Respond to customer enquiries by
 in a timely, professional, and friendly manner

• Handle booking changes and special requests with care and attention to detail

• Follow up on pending enquiries and unresolved issues

• Help maintain a high standard of communication and customer satisfaction

• Ensure customers receive clear, accurate, and well-written information at all times



CRM & Administrative Support



• Maintain and update internal systems, spreadsheets, and CRM records

• Manage and segment contact lists in HubSpot or a similar CRM

• Ensure contact data is clean, accurate, and properly tagged

• Support
 workflows, lead nurturing, and list organisation

• Assist with admin tasks and process improvements as the business grows



Marketing Support



• Create and schedule content for Instagram,
, and LinkedIn

• Assist with captions, simple visuals, and brand-aligned content preparation

• Support newsletters, promotions, and automated
 campaigns

• Update website content when required

• Monitor basic performance metrics and flag practical ideas for improvement



WHAT YOU BRING



• 2–5 years of experience in bookings, customer support, operations, administration, hospitality, wellness, e-commerce support, or digital marketing

• Strong written English and professional communication skills

• Excellent organisation and strong attention to detail

• Comfortable working independently in a remote role

• Able to manage a mix of operational, customer-facing, and marketing-related tasks

• Experience with tools such as HubSpot or another CRM, Google Sheets / Excel, social media platforms, and
 marketing tools

• Canva or basic design skills are a strong plus

• Experience in wellness, hospitality, lifestyle, travel, gifting, or premium service businesses is a plus



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



This role is for someone who is:



• Reliable and responsive

• Highly organised and detail-oriented

• Service-minded and customer-focused

• Proactive and solution-oriented

• Comfortable working with both structure and execution

• Able to take initiative without constant supervision

• Interested in contributing to a premium customer experience and growing with the business over time



APPLICATION CHECK



To confirm that you have carefully read this job description, please start your application with the words:



“Details drive results.”



Then answer the following question in 4–6 lines:



If you were supporting bookings and customer communication for a premium wellness and spa business, what types of details or issues would you pay close attention to in order to ensure a smooth customer experience?



Please also attach your CV to your application.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



IMPORTANT



• This is a full-time remote role based in the Philippines

• Strong written English is essential

• Some overlap with Australian business hours is preferred

• Experience in bookings, customer support, operations, hospitality, administration, or related roles is required

• Candidates who are not comfortable handling both structured coordination work and customer communication may not be the right fit



WHY YOU WILL LOVE IT



• Work closely with the Director in a growing business

• Join a company operating in the premium wellness and experience sector

• Have a real impact on bookings, customer experience, partner coordination, and business support

• Enjoy a varied role with both structure and people-facing responsibilities

• Opportunity to grow into a broader operations or customer experience role over time



LOCATION



Remote – Philippines

Some overlap with Australian business hours preferred

title: Short-Form Video Editor & Content Manager — Instagram Reels & Facebook (Creator Brand)
description:
About the role:

I'm a Black millennial entrepreneur and content creator based in Las Vegas, Nevada with multiple brands — including a brick-and-mortar studio (
) and a growing community brand called Mom Math 
 create content about entrepreneurship, motherhood, and everyday life, and I need a reliable editor who can take my raw footage and turn it into polished, on-brand short-form content posted consistently across Instagram and
.



This is a long-term monthly retainer role. I'm looking for someone who takes ownership, communicates proactively, and can work independently once they understand the brand voice and visual style.



What you'll edit:

Talking-head Reels (me speaking to camera) — 15 to 90 seconds

Studio content for Needle and Stitch — short videos showcasing printing, embroidery, and alterations services to attract corporate and bulk order clients

Mom Math short-form content — punchy, personality-driven Snacks (15–45 sec clips).  Example of Mom Math content style/aesthetic: 

Occasional b-roll and product/service clips



Responsibilities:

Edit raw footage into short-form Reels and
 videos following brand style guides

Add captions, text overlays, and light graphics as needed

Schedule and post content to Instagram and
 on my behalf (up to 6 days/week)

Manage content across multiple brand accounts (Needle and Stitch Studio, LifebyMJ, Mom Math)

Communicate proactively about timelines and flag any issues early



Requirements:

Proven experience editing short-form social content — Reels, TikTok, or
 video

Strong sense of pacing, hook structure, and caption styling for short-form

Experience managing or scheduling social media posts on behalf of a creator

Reliable internet, fast turnaround, and strong written English communication

Able to follow a visual style guide and match an existing aesthetic across brands



Nice to have:

Experience working with Black women creators or lifestyle/entrepreneur brands

Familiarity with CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

Experience with OpusClip or Descript



How to apply:

Send your portfolio or 2–3 examples of Reels or short-form videos you've edited. Include a brief note about your availability and your experience managing content for a creator. Applications without examples will not be considered.



Brand vibe:

Example #1: 

Example #2: 

Example #3: 



Tone: Smart, honest, a little sarcastic. Never preachy. Think Ali Wong meets Brené Brown — real talk with real stakes.

Audience: Black millennial women juggling entrepreneurship, motherhood, and staying sane. They're tired of being talked down to.

Format: Short Form — 15 to 45 seconds. Tight, punchy, high-retention.



Visual style

Captions: Auto-captions styled clean — readable, not cluttered. Sentence case. No all-caps.

Hooks: Text overlay in first 2–3 seconds. Hints at the outcome without giving it away. Creates curiosity before the scroll.

Pacing: Tight cuts. Remove dead air. Keep energy up without feeling rushed.

Text overlays: Aesthetic yet used sparingly for emphasis — not on every sentence. Let the speaking do the work.



Music: Low and ambient underneath. Never competes with voice. Trending audio when appropriate.



What to avoid

- Coach-y or corporate energy — this is a real person, not a course funnel

- Cheesy stock transitions or effects that feel dated

- Cluttered text overlays competing with the speaker

- Generic music that doesn't match the mood



When in doubt, ask: does this feel like something a smart, busy, slightly chaotic millennial mom would actually stop and watch? If yes — ship it.

title: STR Property Management Representative - Operations - $5-6/hr
description:
About the Company

Luxury Lodging is a fast-growing short-term rental property management company overseeing 300+ homes across the United States. Our team is performance-driven. We manage day-to-day operations, including pricing, guest support, maintenance, onboarding, and owner success. We’re hiring someone sharp and reliable to help with essential operational tasks.



This is not a short-term or temporary role! We are looking for someone who wants to commit long-term and grow with the company. This position requires consistency, accountability, and the ability to handle challenges calmly and professionally. If you are actively job hunting, frequently changing roles, or looking for a stepping-stone position, this role will not be the right fit. Please apply only if you are seeking a stable, long-term opportunity and are prepared to take ownership of the role through both smooth and challenging situations!



About the Role

Position: STR Property Management Representative

Location: Remote

Pay: $5-6/hr start

Type: Full-time (Eastern Time)



This is a well-rounded support role for someone who thrives on structure, takes ownership, and solves problems quickly. You will either be handling guest and client communication, coordinate cleanings and maintenance issues, follow up on tasks, assist with turnovers and documentation, and support the general flow of operations. The right person is proactive and clear-minded even when things get chaotic.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Serve as the main point of contact for guest concerns, complaints, and escalations

• Resolve guest issues efficiently while balancing guest satisfaction, company policy, and cost control

• De-escalate challenging situations with professionalism, empathy, and sound judgment

• Coordinate with internal teams (Operations, Housekeeping, Maintenance, Leadership) to ensure timely resolution

• Own guest issues from start to finish, including follow-ups and documentation

• Determine appropriate service recovery actions (refunds, credits, goodwill gestures) when applicable

• Document trends and recurring issues, and proactively flag opportunities for operational improvement

• File and manage guest damage claims, including documentation, follow-up, and coordination with internal teams or platforms

• Complete administrative tasks

• Keep SOPs, reports, and team checklists organized and up to date



What We’re Looking For

• Strong English speaking and writing skills

• Smart, resourceful, and highly reliable

• Strong sense of ownership and accountability

• Fast learner with good judgment and time management

• Excellent problem-solving and decision-making skills

• Organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple open cases

• Confident working across multiple tools

• Detail-oriented and able to work independently with minimal reminders

• Background in Airbnb, hospitality, or remote team coordination is a plus

• Must be looking for long-term growth, not short gigs



How to Apply (All Steps Required)

Note: No AI-generated responses! You will be auto-declined.

1. Send a 1-2 minute voice message introducing yourself:

• Share an example of how you solved a guest or client issue

• Use Vocaroo or Google Drive (make sure it’s set to public)

2. Answer this in writing:

• How would you handle it if a guest checked in and said the place wasn’t cleaned?

• What strategy would you use to stay organized when handling multiple active properties?

3. Attach your resume

• Via a Google Drive link or similar (make sure it's set to public)



We are actively interviewing. If you’re ready to join a team that cares about output and results, apply now.

title: Project Manager (Leadership Team) – URGENT HIRING
description:
Take the next step in your professional journey!

Apply today through our official careers page: 



Company: Ascension Business Solutions LLC

Department: Operations / Leadership

Reports To: CEO / General Manager

Employment Type: Full-Time

Work Setup: Remote

Schedule: U.S. Business Hours (Graveyard Shift – PH Time)

Compensation: Competitive compensation package, commensurate with experience and leadership role alignment



ABOUT THE ROLE

Ascension Business Solutions LLC is seeking a high-accountability Internal Project Manager to lead and execute cross-functional strategic initiatives across Sales, Recruitment, Training & Development, Operations, CRM, and Client Success.



This is not an assistant role. This is an ownership role.



The Internal Project Manager serves as the operational integrator — ensuring leadership vision turns into structured execution. This role is responsible for driving initiatives from ideation to implementation with defined scope, KPIs, role accountability, timelines, and measurable outcomes.



ABS operates as a people operating system. Strategy without execution creates instability. This role ensures that initiatives are delivered with clarity, discipline, and measurable impact.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Project Leadership & Execution

Translate leadership strategy into structured project plans

Define scope, deliverables, timelines, and measurable success metrics

Build implementation roadmaps with clear accountability

Assign responsibilities and enforce deadlines

Identify risks early and escalate blockers proactively

Ensure projects are delivered on time and within scope



2. Cross-Department Coordination

Lead structured project meetings with clear agendas and outcomes

Align Sales ? Recruitment ? Training ? Operations ? Client Success handoffs

Ensure KPIs are aligned across departments

Eliminate silos and reduce execution delays

Establish clear ownership for every deliverable



3. Process & Systems Implementation

Build and standardize SOP frameworks for new services

Implement structured workflows within CRM, HRIS, and reporting systems

Ensure documentation is centralized, clean, and accessible

Audit process adherence and close operational gaps



4. Performance Tracking & Reporting

Define measurable KPIs per initiative

Track weekly progress and provide leadership dashboards

Distinguish leading vs lagging indicators

Recommend course corrections proactively

Improve operational metrics such as retention, onboarding cycle time, readiness rate, and handoff quality



5. New Service Launch Management

When ABS launches a new service line, this role will:

Define required roles and team structure

Coordinate with Recruitment on hiring criteria

Align Training on readiness standards

Align Sales messaging with operational capacity

Ensure full go-live readiness before client-facing rollout



QUALIFICATIONS:

Required Experience:

3–7 years of Project Management experience

Experience leading cross-functional teams

Experience building systems or processes from scratch

Strong understanding of KPI tracking and operational metrics

Experience in service-based organizations



Preferred Experience:

Healthcare or home care industry experience

Experience in scaling or growth-stage organizations



SKILLS & COMPETENCIES

Execution & Ownership

Strong bias toward action

Comfortable enforcing deadlines

High accountability standards

Creates clarity where ambiguity exists



Strategic Thinking

Breaks big vision into tactical execution steps

Understands operational cause-and-effect

Identifies bottlenecks quickly



Communication

Direct but professional

Comfortable managing up, across, and down

Can facilitate structured meetings



Systems-Oriented

Comfortable with CRM systems (GoHighLevel preferred)

Familiar with HRIS systems (BambooHR a plus)

Experience with project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, Monday, etc.)

Strong documentation discipline



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS:

Ascension Business Solutions offers a structured, long-term employment opportunity designed to support stability, growth, and professional development.

Competitive compensation aligned with leadership scope

Paid training and structured onboarding

Fully remote work setup (company-issued laptop and headset)

HMO health coverage (subject to eligibility guidelines)

Paid Time Off (PTO)

Performance-based annual salary increases

Retention and performance bonuses after 6 months



ABS is intentional about building long-term professional partnerships, not short-term or gig-based arrangements.



Why Join Ascension Business Solutions?

Directly impact company scalability and stability

Operate within structured leadership governance

Drive real, measurable operational improvement

Join a values-driven organization guided by Love, Support, and Excellence



Disclaimer:

Responsibilities may evolve based on business needs. Employment is at-will.



How to Apply:

Complete the Application Form and include the following:

Vocaroo introduction link

Updated resume

Device specifications screenshot

Internet speed test result



?? Ensure all details are accurate before submitting. Incomplete applications may not be processed.



Please note: Applications not sent through the link above will not be entertained.

title: Telemarketing Representative – Insurance Renewals
description:
We are seeking a motivated Telemarketing Representative to make outbound calls to homeowners whose insurance policies are approaching renewal. The primary responsibility of this role is to connect with prospective clients, confirm policy renewal details, and schedule or facilitate insurance quotes over the phone with our agency. The ideal candidate will be comfortable speaking with homeowners, identifying opportunities to provide competitive insurance options, and helping generate new business for the agency through proactive outreach.



Key Responsibilities:



Make outbound calls to homeowners with upcoming insurance policy renewals.



Introduce our agency and present the opportunity to review and quote their homeowners insurance policy.



Gather basic policy and property information from prospects.



Qualify leads and transfer interested prospects to a licensed agent or assist with initiating the quote process.



Maintain accurate call notes and prospect information in the agency’s CRM system.



Follow up with prospects when needed to complete quotes or schedule consultations.



Preferred Qualifications:



Strong communication and phone skills.



Comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls.



Sales or telemarketing experience preferred (insurance experience is a plus).



Ability to build rapport quickly and professionally with homeowners.



Organized and detail-oriented with the ability to track prospect information.

title: Operations Lead
description:
We’re hiring our first Operations Lead—a strategic doer who’s ready to roll up their sleeves and build from the ground up. In the early stages, this role will be hands-on: managing day-to-day operations, creating SOPs, supporting client delivery, and refining internal processes. As the business scales, this person will transition into a leadership role, building and managing a remote team of CSRs, Project Managers, and Admins to support our growing client base.



This is a rare opportunity to shape the operational backbone of a healthcare startup from day one.



Key Responsibilities:

Program Execution & Client Support

- Oversee the delivery of dietary and exercise counseling programs to partner clinics

- Serve as the primary point of contact for medical clients, ensuring smooth onboarding, service delivery, and ongoing support

- Translate clinical goals into operational workflows that are scalable and patient-centered



SOP Development & Process Building:

- Create and refine SOPs for service delivery, client onboarding, reporting, and internal coordination

- Identify gaps and inefficiencies, and implement improvements that support quality, compliance, and scalability

- Document best practices and build operational playbooks for future hires



Wearing Multiple Hats:

- Contribute to marketing strategy and planning, including the creation of high-quality marketing materials

- Build internal processes from zero, laying the groundwork for scalable operations across departments

- Collaborate cross-functionally to support evolving business needs beyond core operations



Team Building & Leadership (Future Phase):

- Once business demand increases, recruit and onboard remote support staff (CSRs, Admins, Project Managers)

- Train and manage the team to uphold service standards and client satisfaction

- Foster a culture of accountability, empathy, and continuous improvement



Operational Oversight:

- Create and monitor KPIs such as client satisfaction, task completion, turnaround time, and engagement metrics

- Ensure compliance with healthcare standards and client-specific requirements

- Support billing, scheduling, and reporting functions as needed.



Qualifications

- 2+ years of experience in leadership, operations, client success, or program management

- Proven ability to build systems from scratch and thrive in a startup environment

- Strong communication skills - verbal and written

- Highly organized, proactive, and adaptable to shifting priorities

- Experience managing remote teams or cross-functional projects is a plus

title: Marketing Coordinator (Full-time remote work, earn up to USD 1,600)
description:
Background



The Reliability Academy delivers world-class online training and coaching to clients and students across the globe. To date, we have helped 100+ companies, and trained 2000+ industry professionals, across 50+ countries in all major industries. Founded in 2018, we are headquartered in Brisbane, Australia but work virtually with most of our team based in the Philippines.



Please note this role is advertised as based in the Philippines but we are open to applications for people anywhere in the world.



About Us



Our customers are in all parts of the world, from individuals to large multinational companies. We have big plans and are working to deliver our online training in 8-10 different languages to better serve our customers. We believe in being a force for good and that means:



- building a great company with a strong focus on our values and behaviors. We are building a small, but mighty team that truly enjoys working together and delivers a world-class product and experience to our customers.

- serving our niche to the best of our ability and reaching those less fortunate than us. To that purpose, we have launched the Reliability Academy Scholarship Program enabling students in developing nations to access our training with a 75% Scholarship

- aligning our company mission and vision to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals



The company is growing with a small team of full-time and part-time contractors working across the Asia-Pacific region, currently all reporting to the General Manager, also based in the Philippines whilst our Managing Director is based in Brisbane, Australia. We deliberately hire talent in different regions of the world to keep costs down, create diversity, and build a multi-lingual team.



Role Purpose 



The Marketing Coordinator is responsible for driving online sales growth through B2C marketing initiatives, with a focus on optimizing existing systems, improving conversion performance, and ensuring every campaign contributes directly to revenue. 



This role will oversee the Affiliate Program, manage lead segmentation using RightMessage, and conduct a full audit and optimization of HubSpot
 sequences—including welcome and nurture workflows—to ensure maximum engagement and conversion. 



The Marketing Coordinator will also manage and monitor paid campaigns to drive online course sales and continually refine strategies based on data and performance insights. 



Responsibilities  



As Marketing Coordinator your initial responsibilities will consist of: 



Demand Generation and Strategy 



-Develop and execute marketing strategies aligned with company goals, focusing on driving online B2C conversions. 

-Plan and manage marketing campaigns, PPC campaigns primarily for B2C (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads)

-Continuously monitor, test, and tweak campaigns to optimize results and maximize performance.

-Use RightMessage to manage lead segmentation, ensuring the right message reaches the right audience (B2B and B2C). Monitor performance, refine targeting, and adjust settings as needed by leveraging analytics / insights from Segmetrics. 



Affiliate Program Management 



-Oversee and manage the company’s Affiliate Program using TrackDesk.

-Test and validate system functionality, ensuring affiliates are properly tracked and rewarded.

-Monitor affiliate performance, identify top-performing partners, and develop strategies to drive participation and conversions. 



 Marketing and Automation 



-Review, audit, and optimize
 sequences and workflows within HubSpot, including welcome sequences and nurturing campaigns. 

-Identify opportunities to improve engagement and conversion rates. 

-Make recommendations for adjustments and implement approved changes. 

-Ensure marketing automation and workflows support the company’s inbound marketing and lead nurturing goals. 



Marketing Analytics and HubSpot Management 



-Develop and maintain a marketing performance dashboard to track key metrics, such as lead volume, conversion rates, and website traffic. 

-Integrate and manage HubSpot, cold
 systems, and campaign tracking tools for marketing automation, lead tracking, and reporting. 

-Analyze performance data to optimize campaigns and recommend improvements. 

-Report on marketing activities and outcomes to the General Manager and Managing Director. 





What Success Looks Like 



Succeeding in this role will mean the Marketing Team establishes a steadily growing flow of online course sales, supported by consistent brand visibility and engagement across all channels.  



Success will be measured by the following metrics: 



-Affiliate Program is fully operational and generating measurable conversions. 

-RightMessage segmentation is active and optimized for effective lead targeting. 

-HubSpot workflows and sequences are running efficiently and driving engagement and sales. 

-LinkedIn page is active with regular, relevant posts that maintain engagement and brand trust. 

-Paid campaigns on Google, LinkedIn, and
 achieve an average 
 of 3x or higher. 

-Overall marketing performance shows measurable improvement in lead quality, conversion rates, and ROI. 

 



About You 



Knowledge and skills are important, but we will primarily hire based on attitude and behavior. We are looking for someone who: 



-Is self-motivated and proactive with a positive attitude and a great work ethic. 

-Takes ownership of their work and is results-driven, constantly seeking to improve and optimize. 

-Communicates clearly and effectively, both with internal teams and external stakeholders. 

-Has a deep understanding of inbound marketing strategies and can balance creativity with data-driven decisions. 

-Enjoys working remotely and thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable managing a distributed, diverse team.   

-Is passionate about inbound marketing and embraces data-driven decision-making. 



Your Skills 



Your knowledge, skills and experience: 



-Proven experience in inbound and outbound marketing, and demand generation. 

-Strong digital marketing skills: PPC ads (Google, LinkedIn,
), SEO, outbound (cold
 / LinkedIn outreach) 

-Experience managing marketing performance metrics and reporting on results. 

-Experience with HubSpot Marketing Solution is a requirement; Candidates with experience on Segmetrics, RightMessage and TrackDesk (or similar tools) will be given stronger consideration. 

-Experience in PPC campaign management (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads). 

-Excellent organizational and project management skills. 

-Excellent copywriting and proof-reading skills.  

-You are fluent in English with excellent written and verbal communication skills. Your written English is clear, concise, and accurate. 

-A sound understanding / experience with automation tools and AI (LLMs, agents) would be a bonus, as would experience in leading/managing/coordinating a team 



What’s on Offer



This is a long-term virtual role allowing you to work from home. You will work during Australian business hours i.e. your workday will fall between 7 am to 7 pm GMT+10 to ensure overlap with the rest of the team (who are based in the Philippines). There will be a 3-month probation period.



Base pay between USD 1,000 and USD 1,600 per month depending on experience and skills, with a 13th-month pay in December, 20 days of paid leave, an annual allowance of USD 1,000 towards Private Health Insurance and a chance to earn a performance bonus up to 3 months of salary (subject to business and personal performance).



Applying



If you are interested, please complete the online application (see link below) summarizing your background, experience, and what makes you an excellent candidate for the role. Tell us about yourself, your skills, and why you’re interested in working with us.



Application form: 



This is an important requirement for Reliability Academy, and we would love to have someone on seat as soon as possible, but we will take our time to find the right candidate. That means we will be shortlisting and interviewing soon after this job post has gone live and will continue until we find the right candidate. Therefore, this job could stay open for several weeks or close quickly



Please note, that if you do not apply via the above application form your application will not be considered. We appreciate people who pay attention to detail so please mention the words “Green Banana” when we ask about your aspirations in life.

title: Google Ads Campaign Manager
description:
JOB TITLE

Google Ads Campaign Manager | Strategy, Launch, Optimization, Reporting)



OVERVIEW

We’re looking for a results-driven Google Ads Campaign Manager who can build paid campaigns from start to finish (Search, Performance Max, Display, YouTube) 



This role is ideal for someone who is both strategic and highly execution-oriented: you can build campaigns from scratch, manage budgets responsibly, optimize performance weekly, and produce clean, client-ready reporting that connects spend to measurable outcomes.



RESPONSIBILITIES

+ Campaign Strategy + Setup

  + Plan and launch paid campaigns end-to-end across Google Ads, Meta, and LinkedIn

  + Build campaign structures aligned to goals (lead gen, conversions, pipeline, ROAS)

  + Develop and implement:

    + Keyword strategy (incl. match types, negatives, audience layering)

    + Ad groups and ad formats (RSA, PMax assets, retargeting, etc.)

    + Conversion tracking and event setup (GA4 + GTM preferred)

    + Budget pacing strategy and bid strategy selection



+ Creative + Messaging Collaboration

  + Write or refine ad copy aligned to funnel stage and intent

  + Coordinate with internal team for landing page needs, creative, and brand alignment

  + Ensure CTAs, offer messaging, and lead flow match campaign objectives



+ Optimization + Performance Management

  + Monitor campaigns daily/weekly to improve performance and reduce wasted spend

  + Improve key metrics such as:

    + CPL / CPA

    + Conversion rate

    + CTR and Quality Score (Google)

    + Lead quality feedback loop

  + Run structured testing (A/B creative, copy, audiences, landing pages)

  + Identify issues quickly and fix tracking or funnel breakdowns without delays



+ Reporting + Insights

  + Deliver performance reporting that is clear, actionable, and decision-focused

  + Track results against agreed KPIs and explain what changed, why, and what you’ll do next

  + Provide weekly summaries and monthly reports including:

    + Spend + pacing

    + Conversions + CPL/CPA

    + Top performing campaigns/ad sets/keywords

    + What you tested

    + Next actions and priorities



REQUIRED SKILLS

+ Google Ads expertise (must-have): Search + conversion-driven structure and optimization

+ Strong working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager and LinkedIn Campaign Manager

+ Tracking + attribution fundamentals: GA4, GTM, conversion events, UTMs

+ Clear reporting skills and ability to explain results to non-technical stakeholders

+ Strong attention to detail: budgets, naming conventions, consistent QA checklist habits

+ Comfortable managing multiple campaigns and deadlines



NICE TO HAVE

+ Experience with B2B lead gen and longer sales cycles

+ Landing page optimization experience (CRO fundamentals)

+ HubSpot campaign tracking, lead routing, and CRM reporting basics

+ Looker Studio dashboard experience or repeatable reporting templates



TOOLS YOU’LL USE

+ Google Ads, Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Google Tag Manager (GTM)

+ Meta Business Manager / Ads Manager

+ LinkedIn Campaign Manager

title: Platform/Systems Engineer
description:
We Don't Need Another Backend Developer. We Need an Architect Who Builds Systems That Don't Break.

Platform / Systems Engineer



Most engineers write code. You'll build the orchestration backbone that powers everything else.

About Rescale Media



We're not just another e-commerce company. We're a brand incubator on a mission to build enduring, value-driven brands that bring meaningful products into families' lives.

We've scaled from just drop shipping to a 30+ person team doing $1M+/month. Our goal? Multi 9-figures. And we're just getting started.

???? Learn more at 
dia



Our Core Values

???? GENIUSES & OWNERS We partner with builders who think like founders. Not employees waiting to be told what to do—owners who see a problem and fix it.

? ITERATIONS > HOURS We don't measure success by time at your desk. We measure it by how fast you can test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

???? TRUTH OVER EGO We prioritize honesty and clarity, even when it's uncomfortable. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.



The Mission

Build and own the workflow orchestration backbone.

You'll be responsible for the systems that make everything else possible—reliable, scalable, and resilient infrastructure that processes thousands of jobs without breaking a sweat.



What You'll Do

Design and implement stateful workflow execution systems

Own job lifecycle management from start to finish

Build bulletproof retry logic, timeout handling, and failure recovery

Optimize for throughput and cost efficiency

Ensure systems gracefully handle edge cases and failures

Document and maintain critical infrastructure



What We're Looking For

3+ years of backend/platform engineering experience

Strong experience with workflow orchestration (Temporal, Airflow, Step Functions, or similar)

Deep understanding of distributed systems and state management

Experience building fault-tolerant systems with retry logic and error handling

Proficiency in Python, Go, or Node.js

Familiarity with message queues and event-driven architecture



Bonus Points:

Experience with high-throughput systems

Background in e-commerce or marketing tech

Kubernetes/containerization experience

You've been on-call and know what it means to build systems that let you sleep



This Role Is NOT For...

We're being direct because we respect your time:

Engineers who only want to write code, not own systems

Those who haven't dealt with production failures at scale

Anyone who thinks "it works on my machine" is an acceptable answer

People who can't explain trade-offs in system design



Compensation & Benefits

???? Monthly Salary: $2,000/month

Plus:

Monthly performance bonuses tied to company Operating Profit (5-25% of salary)

Quarterly profit pool distribution (2-7.5% of company profits shared among team)

Remote-first environment

Work with a team of A-players who actually give a damn

Direct founder access—no layers of bureaucracy

Real ownership of your domain—we don't micromanage



Our Hiring Process

We don't waste time—yours or ours. Here's how it works:

Step 1: Application (You're here!)

Step 2: Task Test - Design a configurable workflow that processes a job through multiple stages with retries and state tracking

Step 3: Interview with Founder

Step 4: WhatsApp update for next steps

Step 5: Signing of Independent Contractor and NDA

Step 6: Onboarding and Training

Total timeline: 1 week from application to offer.



Ready to Apply?

???? Apply here:

[  
  ]

Complete the application form above. Be thorough—this is your first impression.



P.S. We're hiring 2 engineers for this role. If you've ever built a system that handled millions of jobs and you're proud of how it recovered from failures, we want to hear about it.

P.P.S. If you're reading this far, you're already more thorough than 90% of applicants. That's exactly who we want.

title: Social Media Editor
description:
Job Title: Social Media Editor


 
 

Location: Remote – Philippines

Hours: [TBC – e.g. 20 hrs/week to start, with potential to grow]

Rate: [TBC]



About Us

We're Alex and Beck — a couple building personal brands on Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. We're not selling a product or a course. We're building an audience around who we actually are — our lifestyle, relationship, travel, and everyday 
nts. We post frequently across multiple accounts and we want someone who can help us turn good raw content into great published content, quickly and consistently.

We're based in Sydney, Australia. We've worked with social media managers in the past, but we've found that what we actually need is someone who executes — an editor with creative instincts, not someone focused on scheduling frameworks and content strategy documents.



The Role

This is primarily an editing and content production role. You will take raw footage, photos, and ideas from us and turn them into polished, publishable content. You'll work across three Instagram accounts, each with a slightly different personality and purpose, and you'll help us maintain a consistent publishing cadence without sacrificing quality.

You will have creative input — we want your ideas, your honest feedback, and your eye. But the job is measured by what gets made and published, not by strategy decks.



What You'll Be Responsible For

Video editing (primary focus)



Editing short-form video content for Reels, TikToks, and YouTube Shorts from raw footage we provide

Adding captions, text overlays, transitions, sound design, and music

Colour grading and basic visual enhancement

Cutting for pace and engagement — you understand hooks, retention, and how people actually watch content



Graphics and static content



Designing carousels, quote tiles, story templates, and thumbnails

Maintaining visual consistency across accounts (fonts, colours, overall aesthetic)

Producing assets that look and feel premium, not templated



Workflow and communication



Reviewing revision notes left in 
 (or equivalent) and turning them around efficiently

Organising files in our shared Google Drive in an agreed folder structure

Flagging when you need more raw content from us so we can plan shoots accordingly

Communicating proactively — we'd rather hear "I need X to finish this" early than silence followed by a delay



Creative input



Suggesting content ideas based on what you're seeing perform in the lifestyle/personal brand space

Flagging trends in audio, editing styles, or formats that could work for our accounts

Being honest if something we've asked for isn't going to land the way we think it will





What This Role Is Not

To be direct: we're not looking for someone to manage our overall social media strategy, write lengthy captions about brand pillars, or tell us we should only post three times a week for maximum algorithm performance. We've been down that road. We want volume and quality, and we want someone who understands that personal brand content is built through consistency and personality — not a single perfectly optimised post per week.

title: Practicum & Internship Placement Coordinator (Contract Role)
description:

This role involves researching eligible clinical sites, contacting organizations directly, gathering program requirements, managing correspondence, and coordinating next steps to secure an interview and placement.

 and phone to inquire about student placement opportunities

• Verify eligibility criteria for practicum placement and confirm alignment with program and state requirements

• Coordinate introductions and schedule interviews between the student and prospective clinical sites

• Maintain outreach tracking logs, communications history, and placement status updates

• Serve as the primary point of contact with organizations until a placement is secured



QUALIFICATIONS

• Strong written and verbal communication skills

• Comfortable making outreach calls and writing professional
s

• Highly organized, with strong research and coordination abilities

• Familiarity with mental health, counseling, social work, or healthcare settings is a plus

• Prior experience in academic placement, HR, or administrative coordination is beneficial but not required



ENGAGEMENT DETAILS

• Remote role with localized outreach to regional clinics and counseling organizations

SUCCESS OUTCOME

Successful placement of the student with an approved practicum/internship site that satisfies program and clinical experience requirements for Summer 2026.

title: Operations & Automation Specialist
description:
Kyri Media

Apply here: 



Operations & Automation Specialist



Remote (Philippines) • Full-Time • Monday–Friday, Cyprus Hours



About Kyri Media

Kyri Media is a fast-growing real estate marketing agency that helps US-based real estate agents build personal brands, grow audiences, and generate leads through short-form video content on Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. We operate with speed, high standards, and a results-first culture. Our team is remote, Philippines-based, and growing fast.



Right now, too much of how we operate runs on manual effort — data entry, status updates, client communications, delay tracking. We’re fixing that. This is a new role and the person who fills it will own the automation layer of the entire business.



The Role

You will design, build, and maintain the automation systems that power Kyri Media’s delivery pipeline. This is not a “manage existing tools” role. You will be building from scratch, connecting platforms that don’t currently talk to each other, and making manual work disappear.



If you can look at a spreadsheet and immediately see five things you would automate, and then actually go build them — this role is for you.



What You’ll Build1. Mastersheet automation

Our mastersheet tracks content performance across Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube for every client. Right now, data is entered manually. You will:



Connect the Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube APIs to pull views, likes, shares, reach, and followers automatically



Build scheduled triggers so rows populate themselves when a video goes live



Eliminate manual data entry from the performance tracking workflow



2. Deliverables pipeline automation

Every video goes through: strategy ? script ? edit ? review ? approval ? posting. You will automate stage transitions so when one stage is complete, the next begins automatically — no manual handoffs.



3. Pumble notifications

Automated messages fire into the correct Pumble channels when a video changes status



No one manually types status updates



Notifications include client name, video title, stage, and responsible tea
mber



4. Client video delivery

When a video is approved, the client receives it automatically — via 
 link,
, or WhatsApp — triggered by a status change. No one on the team manually sends deliverables.



5. Delay flagging and escalation

Every pipeline stage has a deadline



When a stage goes overdue, the system flags it automatically in Pumble



Escalation rules fire if the delay is not resolved within a set window



The goal: zero manual chasing



Must-Have Requirements

These are non-negotiable. Do not apply without them.



Proven Google Apps Script experience — you have built scripts that run unsupervised in a real business, not just in personal projects



Demonstrated API integration experience — you have pulled data from external platforms (social media, CRMs, or similar) into Google Sheets automatically



Experience with Make (Integromat), Zapier, or n8n for multi-platform automation



You have used Claude API, ChatGPT API, or similar AI APIs to build actual tools



Portfolio or verifiable examples of automation work you have built



You can explain what you built, why you built it that way, what broke, and how you fixed it



Strong Signals (Not Required, But Will Move You Up the List)

Background inside a digital agency or content business — you already understand the strategy-to-posting workflow



Experience connecting 
, Google Sheets, and communication tools



You have built delay-flagging or SLA-tracking systems before



You can read an existing process, identify the inefficiencies, and propose a solution without being asked



Automatic Disqualifiers

You describe automation in vague terms without specifics — “I can build workflows and systems” is not an answer



Your portfolio shows only Excel macros, not Google Apps Script



You have no examples of something that runs unsupervised without breaking



You cannot explain how you would connect a social media API to a Google Sheet



How We Hire

We do not hire based on interviews alone. The process is:



Application review — portfolio and examples checked first. No portfolio = no response.



Technical test task — you will receive a sample mastersheet and a specific brief. 48 hours to build a working script. This is the real filter.



15-minute intro call — confirm setup, availability, and alignment.



Offer.



The test task is not optional. If you are not willing to complete it, please do not apply.



What We Offer

$400–$1,200/month based on demonstrated skill and output



Fully remote, work from home



Clear scope: five defined automation systems to build, then ongoing ownership



Direct access to the founder — no layers of management, no slow approvals



Long-term role — as we scale, this role scales with us



You will own systems that touch every part of the business



How to Apply: Fill out the form below

Applications without examples will not receive a response.

description:
ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Applicant Tracking System (ATS) administration including implementation of new processes, workflows, process improvement, reporting, and data integrity.

QUALIFICATIONS AND EXPECTATIONS:

EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE:

title: AI Video Editor for Ecommerce Ads (Higgsfield, CapCut, ElevenLabs)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company producing high-converting video ads for DTC brands in industries such as supplements, footwear, and lifestyle products.



We are looking to hire 2 AI Video Editors to start immediately by the end of this week.



The ideal candidate can create extremely realistic AI-generated video ads that are indistinguishable from real footage, with strong editing and creative skills for direct-response advertising.



This role is ideal for someone who understands performance marketing, high-volume creative production, and AI video generation tools.





What You'll Do

• Produce 20–50 fully AI-generated video ads per week for multiple ecommerce brands

• Create AI talking heads, UGC-style ads, and b-roll scenes using advanced AI tools

• Edit and assemble all video content in CapCut with expert-level precision

• Analyze competitor ads on Meta Ads Library and Google to develop high-converting ad variations

• Concept, build, and iterate multiple creative angles and hooks that drive conversions

• Assist with script refinement or hook optimization when needed (scripts usually provided)





What We're Looking For

• Proven experience creating AI-generated video ads for DTC ecommerce brands

• Strong proficiency with AI tools such as Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Expert-level CapCut editing skills with a strong portfolio

• Ability to create extremely realistic AI visuals of people, products, and environments

• Strong understanding of direct-response ad creative and what makes ads convert

• Ability to work independently and produce high-volume creative output





Nice to Have

• Experience with Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Library or competitor research tools

• Experience creating UGC-style ads for paid social





Role Details

• Part-time role (32 hours per week)

• Flexible schedule Monday–Saturday

• Remote position

• We are hiring 2 editors immediately and expect onboarding by the end of this week





How to Apply

To confirm you read this entire post, start your application with the phrase:



AICreator492



Then answer the following questions:



1. Walk us through your workflow for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style video ad from start to finish. From receiving a script to delivering the final edit in CapCut. 

2. Which AI tools do you currently use for video generation, image generation, and voice generation? Rate your proficiency with each tool (beginner / intermediate / advanced). 

3. How do you ensure that AI-generated talking heads and visuals look realistic enough to be used in paid ads? What techniques or tools do you use to avoid the typical "AI look"? 

4. When analyzing competitor ads for inspiration, what specific elements do you look for that indicate high conversion potential? 

5. How long does it take you to create a single 25-second short-form video ad that is fully AI-generated, from start to finished edit? 

6. Please share your portfolio of extremely realistic AI-generated ecommerce video ads that demonstrate your ability to create converting content.





If you're passionate about AI video creation, performance marketing, and high-volume creative production, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Marketing VA — AI-Powered Generalist | Women's Health & Digital Marketing Brand
description:
Marketing VA — AI-Powered Generalist | Venture Studio



About Us

We are a venture studio building multiple brands and business projects simultaneously across women's health, digital marketing, and direct-response advertising. Our projects move fast, span multiple industries, and require people who can keep up with a high-output environment where priorities shift and new challenges appear constantly. We are a small, lean team and every person on it carries real weight.

About the Role

We are looking for a Marketing VA who is sharp, resourceful, and genuinely good at using AI tools to get real work done. This is not a role where you execute a fixed list of tasks every week. We bring problems to the table and we need someone who can figure out how to solve them — using research, AI, good judgment, or all three. The projects you will work on are live, real, and growing. There is significant upside for someone who performs well, as we have multiple ventures at different stages and the right person will grow with us across all of them.

What You Will Be Working On

The work covers a wide range of marketing and business support activities. On any given week you might be researching competitor funnels and ad strategies, helping build out content briefs for video productions, drafting copy for campaigns, supporting logistics for live community events, organizing strategy session outputs into actionable documents, sourcing vendors, or assisting with the coordination of a multi-format content universe that includes real shoots, real talent, and real deadlines. We work across Meta advertising, short-form video content, telehealth marketing, direct-response copy, and
 — and the scope continues to expand as new projects launch.

You will be given context, pointed at a problem, and trusted to come back with something useful. The better you get at understanding how we think and what good output looks like in our world, the more responsibility you will be handed.

What We Are Looking For

The single most important thing we need from you is judgment. Specifically, the ability to use AI tools and actually evaluate what comes out. We use Claude and other AI tools heavily across our work, and the quality of that work depends entirely on whether the person reviewing the output can tell the difference between something sharp and something that just sounds okay. If you cannot make that distinction, the tools are useless. If you can, you become one of the most valuable people on the team.

Beyond that, we need someone who is fast, curious, and willing to figure things out rather than wait to be taught. You do not need to be an expert in every area we work in. You need to be the kind of person who, when handed something unfamiliar, digs in and works it out. Strong written English is non-negotiable. Comfort with Google Workspace, communication tools like Slack or WhatsApp, and a basic familiarity with how Meta advertising works are all helpful. Canva, any content scheduling platform, or prior experience in a digital marketing environment are a bonus.

We are a real team doing real work with real results. This is not a dead-end support role — it is an entry point into a studio that is actively building ventures with meaningful upside, and we promote from within based on performance.

Hours and Availability

We are starting this as a part-time engagement with a clear path to full-time as the workload and trust develop. We need at least a few hours of overlap with US Pacific Time each day. We move quickly and responsiveness during working hours matters — this is not a purely async role.

How to Apply

title: Marketing VA — AI-Powered Generalist | Venture Studio
description:
About Us



We are a venture studio building multiple brands and business projects simultaneously across women's health, digital marketing, and direct-response advertising. Our projects move fast, span multiple industries, and require people who can keep up with a high-output environment where priorities shift and new challenges appear constantly. We are a small, lean team and every person on it carries real weight.



---



About the Role



We are looking for a Marketing VA who is sharp, resourceful, and genuinely good at using AI tools to get real work done. This is not a role where you execute a fixed list of tasks every week. We bring problems to the table and we need someone who can figure out how to solve them — using research, AI, good judgment, or all three. The projects you will work on are live, real, and growing. There is significant upside for someone who performs well, as we have multiple ventures at different stages and the right person will grow with us across all of them.



We will be honest with you upfront: we are looking for the smartest applicants in the country. If you graduated cum laude, finished in the top of your class, or have always been the person in the room who figures things out fastest — this role was written for you. Part of our hiring process includes an IQ assessment because we need fast thinkers who can process new information quickly, connect dots others miss, and make good decisions without being walked through every step. If that excites you rather than intimidates you, keep reading.



---



What You Will Be Working On



The work covers a wide range of marketing and business support activities. On any given week you might be researching competitor funnels and ad strategies, helping build out content briefs for video productions, drafting copy for campaigns, supporting logistics for live community events, organizing strategy session outputs into actionable documents, sourcing vendors, or assisting with the coordination of a multi-format content universe that includes real shoots, real talent, and real deadlines. We work across Meta advertising, short-form video content, telehealth marketing, direct-response copy, and
 — and the scope continues to expand as new projects launch.



You will be given context, pointed at a problem, and trusted to come back with something useful. The better you get at understanding how we think and what good output looks like in our world, the more responsibility you will be handed.



---



What We Are Looking For



The single most important thing we need from you is judgment. Specifically, the ability to use AI tools and actually evaluate what comes out. We use Claude and other AI tools heavily across our work, and the quality of that work depends entirely on whether the person reviewing the output can tell the difference between something sharp and something that just sounds okay. If you cannot make that distinction, the tools are useless. If you can, you become one of the most valuable people on the team.



Your English must be flawless — written and spoken. You will be communicating directly with our US-based business partners and collaborators, and we need someone who shows up to those conversations with full confidence and zero friction. This means perfect grammar, a natural vocabulary, and the ability to hold a professional conversation that feels seamless to anyone on the other end. We are a globally distributed team but we operate at a US business standard in every interaction, and we need you to represent that standard without exception.



Beyond that, we need someone who is fast, curious, and willing to figure things out rather than wait to be taught. You do not need to be an expert in every area we work in. You need to be the kind of person who, when handed something unfamiliar, digs in and works it out. Comfort with Google Workspace, communication tools like Slack or WhatsApp, and a basic familiarity with how Meta advertising works are all helpful. Canva, any content scheduling platform, or prior experience in a digital marketing environment are a bonus.



We are a real team doing real work with real results. This is not a dead-end support role — it is an entry point into a studio that is actively building ventures with meaningful upside, and we promote from within based on performance.



---



Hours and Availability



We are starting this as a part-time engagement with a clear path to full-time as the workload and trust develop. We need at least a few hours of overlap with US Pacific Time each day. We move quickly and responsiveness during working hours matters — this is not a purely async role.



---



How to Apply



Tell us about a time you used an AI tool to solve a real work problem. Walk us through what the problem was, how you approached it, and how you evaluated whether the output was actually good. We are not grading you on having the perfect answer — we are looking for evidence that you think critically about the tools you use and do not just accept whatever comes out. Please also include your academic background and any honors or distinctions you received. If you want to go the extra mile send a personalized LOOM VIDEO.

mbers ramp quickly

title: Social Media Marketer
description:
We are hiring a new Social Media Strategist for our Agency and you will help us to create viral Reels and manage the accounts of our clients to grow them to higher numbers and scale our agency. We 4x our revenue last month and with this foundation we want to scale even higher now, so we need an experienced Social Media Marketing Strategist to maintain the quality for our clients. If you already have experience with Social Media (Short Form Content on Instagram Reels), you are creative, know how to create video concepts that go viral and how to analyse viral videos, this job is perfect for you.



Why you should work with us:



- You start with established personal brands - The client(s) you will work with, have proven concepts, so you can build on a solid foundation and use the style of their existing videos to develop even better concepts.

- AI Implementation - AI is becoming more and more relevant and we are already using AI for many different areas, especially for content (picture/video) creation, so you are up to date with AI for social media while other companies don’t use AI at all. So you are 3 steps ahead.

- Different projects - Step by step you will work with different accounts / clients so you can be creative in different areas.

- Long Term partnership - We are only looking for long term employees, so you will work with us for a long time and have a stable income with a growing agency.

- Established Agency - Our agency is active since 2022, so we gained a lot of experience in all fields of social media, so you will learn from our experience which will help you to improve your social media skills.

- Clear guides and onboarding - You will clear instructions on how to do you work in a detailed onboarding and training. Combined with your own knowledge we will make sure to have the best results.



Your specific task:



You have 3 daily main tasks to focus on, besides that you will get more different tasks over the time when we see that you’re doing a great job:



1. Market Research - You go through the market and find viral Reels / Trends from other creators that have potential to go viral for our clients

2. Concept Creation - Based on your research you create the specific video concepts that our content team / clients should create.

3. Analyse our videos - Not only looking for new concepts is important but also analysing our own accounts and videos, finding winning patterns and implementing these information in the concept creation.



Other potential tasks in the future that give you more responsibility:



- Team Management - We have a big team for reposting content, where we need support with employee onboarding, technical setups and video creation

- More clients - Depending on your workload you will work with more of our clients and help with more different concepts

- Implementing complete new ideas - Your main task is to improve our current system but we always have new ideas, new concepts and new strategies that we need to implement and test with our existing systems.



What we expect and need from you:



- Experience with Social Media / Short Form video creation. Not only uploading simple posts for companies but actual experience and skills in video conception for content that goes viral and analysing viral videos.

- Experience in the Online Marketing Space. This is not a beginner job and you should know how social media is used in the business world.

- 7 Days / week. This is a well paid job, so we are looking for a high performing employee.

- Fluent English (speaking & writing) since our clients are mainly from USA.



Salary and Perspective:



Since we are looking for the best employee for this job, we start with a salary of $800 per month. In the future there is a chance for more if you do a good job and you help us to reach our company goals. Depending on your skills and results you can get more responsibility and more projects.



If you’re looking for a long term job, then message me here with the code word “smms” in your application :)

title: Instagram Influencer Outreach Specialist
description:
We’re a fast-growing DTC brand looking for an experienced Instagram Influencer Outreach Specialist to help us consistently find and contact creators, then secure collaborations where we send our product for free in exchange for one or more Instagram Stories.



This is a hands-on role focused on research + outreach + follow-up + tracking. We need someone who has done influencer seeding/outreach before and can show past results.



What you’ll do



Find Instagram creators that match our criteria (followers, engagement, niche, audience location, content style, etc.).



Qualify accounts (spot fake followers/engagement, check consistency, content quality, audience fit).



Reach out via Instagram DM and/or
, follow up consistently, and close deals.



Confirm deliverables: # of stories, posting date/time window, tags/mentions, link requirements (if any), and any usage permissions (if needed).



Collect shipping details and coordinate with our team for product sending.



Track everything in a spreadsheet/CRM: contacted, responses, follow-ups, accepted, shipped, posted, notes, results.



Creator criteria



We will start with baseline criteria (e.g., minimum followers + engagement) and adjust/expand criteria over time as we learn what performs best.

You must be comfortable iterating criteria and improving targeting weekly.



Requirements (must-have)



Proven experience doing Instagram influencer outreach / product seeding (must have done this before).



Strong communication and negotiation skills (English).



Organized: can manage high-volume outreach + follow-ups without dropping threads.



Ability to evaluate creators quickly (fake engagement detection, audience fit, content quality).



Comfortable using Google Sheets/Airtable/Notion for tracking.



Nice-to-have



Experience in DTC / e-commerce and story-based campaigns.



Familiar with influencer tools/databases (optional).



Ability to improve outreach scripts and test different angles.



KPIs / Expectations



Daily: 30–80 qualified creators contacted (depending on quality and niche).



Weekly: X collaborations confirmed and scheduled (we’ll set targets together).



High follow-up discipline (most wins come from follow-ups #2–#5).



Compensation



Hourly or monthly retainer (based on experience)



Optional performance bonus per confirmed post or creator deal closed



How to apply



Please include:



A short intro + your availability/timezone



Proof of past IG outreach work (a brief case study or summary)



Metrics from past outreach (e.g., response rate, deals closed/week, typical deliverables)



A sample list of 10 creators you would target (links + follower count + engagement estimate)



A short DM script you would send to a creator



Answer: “How do you quickly spot fake engagement?”

title: Integrator / Head of Operations & Execution — DTC Supplement Brand (7-Figure)
description:
Job Title: Integrator / Head of Operations & Execution — DTC Supplement Brand (7-Figure)

Salary: $2,000–$3,000/month + Profit Share Bonus

Hours: Part-Time (20 hrs/week) ? Full-Time after 3 months

Timezone: GMT+1 to GMT+4 (European / Middle Eastern business hours)



About Us

Parmint is a 7-figure DTC supplement brand specializing in internal body freshness. We sell directly to consumers through high-converting funnels,
/Meta ads, and
 marketing. Our core product helps people feel confident from the inside out — and we're growing fast.

We're looking for an Integrator — someone who can take the founder's vision and turn it into reality. You'll be the operational backbone of the company: building systems, managing people, executing strategies, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.

This is NOT a virtual assistant role. This is a leadership position for someone who wants to help build and run a real company — with skin in the game through profit sharing.



What You'll Do



Operations & Systems: Create SOPs, workflows, and processes from scratch. Build the operational infrastructure that allows the company to scale without the founder being involved in every decision.

Team Management: Help identify, hire, and manage tea
mbers (video editors, customer service, copywriters, media buyers). You'll be their point of contact and make sure everyone delivers on time and on quality.

Marketing Execution: Oversee the execution of
/Meta ad campaigns,
 sequences (Klaviyo), quiz funnels, landing pages, and creative production. You don't need to be the one running ads — but you need to deeply understand how DTC marketing works so you can manage people who do.

Project Management: Keep all moving parts organized. From ad creative production to product launches to customer service escalations — you make sure things get done.

Financial Oversight: Help track budgets, manage invoices, reconcile expenses, and keep the founder informed on financial health.

Strategic Support: Provide input on decisions, flag problems before they become crises, and bring structure to the founder's ideas.





Required



You've worked inside a DTC brand or agency (ideally $1M–$10M range). You know what a funnel is, how
 ads work, what Klaviyo does, and why AOV, LTV, and ROAS matter.

You've built or managed systems, processes, or teams in a previous role.

English fluency (written and spoken) — non-negotiable.

Available during GMT+1 to GMT+4 business hours.

Self-starter: you see a problem, you flag it, you propose a solution, you execute.

Detail-oriented and patient. You double-check everything and care about doing things right.



Nice to Have



Experience in a supplement or health brand, especially marketing health products on Meta.

Hands-on experience with Shopify, Klaviyo, ClickFunnels, or similar tools.

Spanish or Italian language skills.





Compensation



Base: $2,000–$3,000/month (based on experience and location)

Bonus: 5–10% of net profits after 3-month trial period

Growth: This role grows into a full COO position as the company scales





How It Works

Month 1–2 (Part-Time, ~20 hrs/week): You'll audit Parmint's operations — ads, funnels,
, team, customer journey — and present an action plan with prioritized SOPs. This is our mutual test.

Month 3 (Decision Point): If the plan is solid and execution is strong, we move to full-time and profit sharing kicks in.

Month 4+ (Full-Time): You build systems, hire and manage the team, and run day-to-day operations. The founder focuses exclusively on growth strategy.



How to Apply

Send an
 to [YOUR
] with the subject: "Integrator — [Your Name]"

Include:



A short intro about yourself (2–3 paragraphs max). Who are you, what have you done, why does this role interest you?

Your experience with DTC/e-commerce brands. What brands did you work with? What was your role? What results did you achieve?

A 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself and explaining why you'd be a great fit. (Mandatory — applications without a video will not be reviewed.)

Your salary expectation (monthly, USD).



No generic cover letters. No AI-generated copy-paste applications. We read every application personally.

title: LinkedIn Content Writer & Visual Storyteller
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a sharp, creative LinkedIn Content Writer who can build a powerful personal or brand presence on LinkedIn, one that stops the scroll, earns trust, and drives real engagement. This isn't a copy-paste content mill role. You'll be crafting 5 high-quality posts per week that combine authoritative writing with visually compelling, data-driven infographics and model-style graphic design.



What You'll Do

You'll write and publish 5 LinkedIn posts daily, each crafted to educate, provoke thought, or inspire action within a specific niche. Every post must feel like it came from a credible expert, not a content scheduler. Alongside your writing, you'll design or direct infographics, carousel frameworks, and model-style visual breakdowns. Think clean hierarchy, bold typography, and data visualization that makes complex ideas instantly digestible.



You'll research trending topics and industry conversations to stay ahead of the curve, develop a consistent voice and editorial calendar, A/B test hooks and formats, and analyze post performance to continuously refine the content strategy.



What We're Looking For

You have at least 2 years of experience writing professional content for LinkedIn, with a portfolio that proves you can drive engagement, not just impressions. You understand what makes a LinkedIn hook work in the first three lines, and you know how to structure a post for maximum dwell time and comments.



On the design side, you're comfortable in Canva, Figma, or Adobe Express and can produce infographics that look like they belong on a top-tier thought leader's feed. You have a strong eye for layout, color, and information hierarchy. Bonus points if you've grown a LinkedIn account from scratch or ghostwritten for executives or founders.



Non-Negotiables

Consistency is everything here: 5 posts per week, every week, on schedule. Each piece of content must be original, well-researched, and free of generic filler. You take ownership of results and aren't waiting to be managed.



Compensation

Competitive, based on experience. Performance bonuses tied to engagement growth and follower milestones.

title: Google Media Buyer (Remote & flexible)
description:
Apply here: 

Apply here: 



GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where smart ideas turn into real impact.

We build and scale online brands across international markets, and we empower our tea
mbers to take ownership, grow quickly, and shape the future of our business alongside us.



Why This Role Exists

This role plays a meaningful part in the growth of the company ????



As a Google Ads Media Buyer, you’ll directly contribute to improving the performance of our Google Ads channel which drives around 90% of our total revenue, while developing your skills in a performance-driven environment.



You’ll help elevate our campaign structure, strategy, and overall account performance, ensuring our ad spend translates into scalable and profitable growth.



This is a role for someone who wants to build, improve, and grow, not just maintain the status quo.



What You’ll Own & Build

In this role, you’ll be trusted with real responsibility from day one. Your success will be measured in your first 90 days based on the following metrics:

- Developing and implementing a new or improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping campaigns for better scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements that result in a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Using data insights to continuously refine bidding, structure, and feed performance



What We’re Looking For

We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has at least 3 years of hands-on experience in performance marketing or media buying

- Has direct experience with Google Shopping campaigns for large eCommerce catalogs (10,000+ products)

title: Ecommerce Multimedia Designer (Remote with flexible hours)
description:
Founded in 2018 and headquartered in The Netherlands, GTE is on a mission to build the most efficient global direct-to-consumer infrastructure and become the world’s largest e-commerce company—powered by a collective of successful, scalable brands. By end of 2026, we’re aiming to achieve $500 million in revenue and operate over 50 thriving online stores worldwide.



With a team of 160+ top-tier remote e-commerce professionals across the globe, we blend local brand experiences with cross-border logistics, ensuring every customer feels connected—no matter where they are.



At our core, we value hard work, freedom with responsibility, constant improvement, and a mindset of positivity. We believe in building a high-performance, remote-first culture where honesty, excellence, and creativity drive everything we do—because the future of work is global, and we’re building it together;





We’re on the lookout for a Multimedia Designer to join our expanding team and drive our company’s growth!





The Challenge

This role will support in producing product images, website graphics, and assist with AI video creation. The challenge is to deliver high-quality output quickly, reduce the need for revisions, and leverage AI tools effectively to maximize efficiency.

We would love to hear from you if…

 -You’re comfortable in Figma (Auto Layout, Components, Variants).

- You consistently balance speed with quality of work.

 





System Requirements:

- Windows: i5 13th Gen or above, 16GB RAM or above.

- Mac: M2 or above.





Couple of the notes about the role

- This role is an Independent Contractor position, offering flexibility, autonomy, and the opportunity to manage your own schedule while making a meaningful impact on our operations. 

- You must be able to commit at least 8 hours per day, 40 hours per week.

- We require everybody in the team to use Hubstaff to track hours worked.





If you are excited about the opportunity and feel like you are a good fit, we encourage you to apply today here:
