title: Interior documentor
description:
interior Designer (ArchiCAD + InDesign) | Full-Time | Philippines (9am–6pm PHT)

Mid–Senior Level | 2-Month Contract (Initial Engagement)



We are a Melbourne-based architecture and interior design studio working on high-end residential projects. Our work is calm, refined and highly resolved, with a focus on restraint, material quality, and spatial clarity.



We are looking for an experienced interior designer to join our team remotely on an initial two-month contract.



This is a production-focused role. You will take direction and turn it into clear, resolved, well-presented work.



About the Role



You will work across multiple residential projects, producing interiors documentation to our standards from early concept through to documentation and presentation.



You must be able to think through drawings, take direction, and recognise when something needs to be clarified.



Responsibilities



• Develop interior layouts, joinery, and material schemes from direction

• Produce interior documentation in ArchiCAD under direction

• Translate markups and sketches into clear, buildable drawings

• Prepare finishes and FF&E schedules in Excel

• Prepare high-quality presentations in InDesign

• Maintain consistency across drawings, schedules, and presentations

• Identify gaps, inconsistencies, or risks and raise them early



Requirements



• 4+ years experience in interior design (residential preferred)

• Strong ArchiCAD skills

• Strong InDesign skills (non-negotiable)

• Strong Excel skills (required)

• Experience with joinery, wet areas, and finishes

• Ability to read and understand architectural drawings

• Excellent written and spoken English (non-negotiable)



Bonus (not essential)



• Experience with Programa (favourable)

• Experience working with Australian or international studios



Hours



• Full-time: 9:00am – 6:00pm Philippine time (Monday–Friday)

• Remote role (Philippines-based)



Contract Terms



• Initial 2-month contract

• Time is tracked and paid based on accurately recorded hours

• Daily time tracking is required

• Workload and priorities are allocated and managed by our team



To Apply



Please follow these steps carefully. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

 1. Write a short introduction (max 150 words)

 2. Attach your portfolio (PDF or link)

 3. Include your hourly rate

 4. Record a short video (1–2 minutes) answering:

• Your experience with ArchiCAD, InDesign, and Excel

• The type of projects you have worked on

• Why you are a good fit for this role

 5. Provide a copy of your academic transcript / school results

 6. Provide at least two professional references with contact details

 7. Start your application with: “I can think through drawings”



Screening Process



Shortlisted candidates will be given a paid test task.

title: Customer Service Rep (Must have strong English)
description:
Customer Service Representative



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Type: Full-Time

Schedule: U.S. Eastern Time zone business hours



ABOUT THE COMPANY



We are a growing e-commerce and retail fashion brand based in Atlanta, GA. We offer premiu
n's and women's clothing, suits, accessories, and footwear through our online store and physical retail locations. We are a fast-paced, customer-first company that values quality, responsiveness, and attention to detail in everything we do.



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a Customer Service Representative to serve as the primary point of contact for our customers across
, chat, social media, and phone. This is a full-time, remote position based in the Philippines, supporting our U.S.-based operations during Eastern Time business hours.



The ideal candidate has a proven track record of delivering outstanding customer service, communicates with excellent English and proper grammar, and takes pride in representing a brand professionally. You will be trained on all tools and systems, but you must come in ready to communicate clearly, solve problems independently, and go above and beyond for every customer interaction.



RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Respond to customer inquiries via
, live chat, social media (Instagram,
), and phone in a timely, professional, and friendly manner

2. Assist customers with order status, shipping questions, returns, exchanges, and product information

3. Process orders, returns, refunds, and exchanges accurately using the company's e-commerce platform

4. Resolve customer complaints and issues with empathy, patience, and a solutions-oriented approach

5. Maintain and update customer records and order notes in the company's systems

6. Monitor and respond to online reviews, comments, and direct messages across social media platforms

7. Edit and resize product photos for the online store, social media, and marketing materials using photo editing tools (Canva, Photoshop, or similar)

8. Assist with product listing updates, descriptions, and content uploads on the e-commerce platform

9. Escalate complex or unresolved issues to management with clear documentation and context

10. Proactively identify patterns in customer questions or complaints and suggest improvements to processes, FAQs, or product listings

11. Support other administrative and operational tasks as assigned



REQUIREMENTS



Must-Have Qualifications



1. 2+ years of customer service experience, preferably in e-commerce, retail, or fashion

2. Excellent written and verbal English communication skills with proper grammar, spelling, and punctuation

3. Proven track record of delivering exceptional customer service and resolving issues effectively

4. Professional, warm, and brand-appropriate tone in all written and verbal communications

5. Experience editing photos for product listings, social media, or marketing (Canva, Photoshop, Lightroom, or similar tools)

6. Strong attention to detail and ability to maintain accuracy across orders, records, and communications

7. Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision

8. Reliable internet connection and quiet, professional home workspace

9. Available to work during U.S. Eastern Time business hours



Preferred Qualifications



10. Experience with Shopify or similar e-commerce platforms

11. Familiarity with social media management and responding to customer engagement on Instagram and

12. Experience with customer service tools such as Zendesk, Freshdesk, Gorgias, or similar

13. Background in fashion, retail, or apparel



KEY TRAITS WE'RE LOOKING FOR



1. Exceptional Communicator: You write and speak with clarity, warmth, and professionalism. Your grammar and tone are consistently polished.

2. Customer-First Mindset: You genuinely care about the customer experience and go the extra mile to make things right.

3. Detail-Oriented: You catch errors before they reach the customer, whether in an
, a product listing, or an order.

4. Problem Solver: You think critically, take initiative, and don't wait to be told what to do when something needs to be fixed.

5. Reliable and Consistent: You show up on time, meet deadlines, and deliver quality work every day.

6. Eager to Learn: You're comfortable being trained on new tools and technology and pick things up quickly.



TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGY



You will be fully trained on all tools and platforms used in this role. Familiarity with any of the following is a plus but not required:



1. E-commerce platform (Shopify or similar)

2. Photo editing tools (Canva, Photoshop, Lightroom)

3.
 and communication tools

4. Social media platforms (Instagram,
)

5. Customer service and ticketing systems



HOW TO APPLY



Interested candidates should submit their resume and a brief cover letter highlighting their customer service experience and English communication skills. Please include a sample of any photo editing work if available.

title: SENIOR VA — EU B2B, MARKETING & OPERATIONS
description:
SENIOR VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — B2B MARKETING & OPERATIONS

ShoulderSink ApS | Remote | Part-time (50%) with path to full-time by end of 2026

 

 

ABOUT US

 

ShoulderSink is a small Danish B2B company. We make mobile hand hygiene solutions for commercial vehicles — our product is installed in 50,000+ vehicles across Europe. Small team, clear strategy and growing fast across key European markets.

 

 

THE ROLE

 

You work directly with the founder across three areas:

 

Operations (25%): Track our plans, flag slipping deadlines, ask the right questions, keep things moving without being asked.

 

Marketing (35%): Build the monthly content calendar. Draft posts using AI tools. Schedule and publish on LinkedIn,
 and Instagram across several languages. Track META ad campaigns in Germany and the Netherlands.

 

Projects (40%): Build prospect lists, execute approved
 outreach, log everything in Pipedrive CRM, support influencer programmes and event preparation.

 

This is a close working relationship. You will have daily contact with the founder and a weekly video status meeting. You need a minimum 2-hour overlap with European/UK business hours (CET).

 

 

WHAT WE NEED

 

- C2 written English — non-negotiable. German or French would be a plus.

- 3+ years as a VA or coordinator in a B2B environment

- Comfortable using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT or similar) to draft and refine content

- Experience with LinkedIn,
, Google Sheets and Gmail

- CRM experience — Pipedrive preferred

- Proactive communication style: you flag problems before they become crises, not after

- Available for daily contact and weekly video check-in during EU/UK business hours

 

 

WHAT WE OFFER

 

- $600/month at 50% hours

- Performance bonus after 6 months — based on personal and company KPIs

- Possibility of full-time position by end of 2026 for the right person

- Direct, daily access to the founder — fast decisions, no corporate layers

- A real senior role with genuine responsibility — not a task list

- Stable company, clear processes, documented strategy

- Confidentiality agreement required before onboarding

 

 

PLEASE APPLY VIA THIS PLATFORM

 

Please include:

- A short cover note (max 150 words) — why this role, why you. Be specific. Generic applications will not be considered.

- One concrete example of a time you flagged a problem proactively before it became an issue

- Which AI tools have you used, and for what tasks? Give one specific example.

- Your CRM experience — which platform, and what was your role?

- Your available hours and CET overlap

title: Product manager @ vidrush.ai
description:
VidRush is an AI-native video production platform that replaces an entire video team with coordinated AI agents.



Creators turn a simple idea into a fully produced, long-form video—research, script, voiceover, visuals, motion graphics, and rendering—in under an hour. No timelines. No editing headaches. Just intent ? finished video.



We’re building a new way to create video that feels more like writing than editing, and we’re already seeing strong traction from serious creators and media teams.



If you’re excited about AI, creator tools, and building category-defining products from first principles, you’ll fit right in.



The Role



We’re hiring a Product Manager to streamline execution and product delivery across multiple teams, including both standard development and R&D/AI work.



You’ll work directly with founders and engineering leads to:



define strategy and priorities



translate that strategy into clear requirements



manage cross-team execution in Jira



enforce accountability, visibility, and predictable delivery



help the team ship high-quality work faster without chaos



This role blends classic product thinking with strong Product Ops / Delivery instincts.





What You’ll Do



Strategy & Prioritization

Help define the product strategy for the next 4–12 weeks



Translate company goals into a focused roadmap



Make tradeoffs and say “no” when necessary to protect velocity





Requirements & Planning

Write clear, concrete feature requirements before development starts



Align frontend and backend expectations early to avoid mismatches late



Define ownership: who’s responsible for what, and what “done” means



Execution & Accountability

Own Jira: maintain a clean backlog, run sprint planning, and drive follow-through



Track progress and surface blockers early (before a task stalls for weeks)



Improve team velocity and visibility across time zones



Managing R&D / AI Work

Structure exploration work using “spikes” and experiments



Reduce endless trial-and-error by defining:



why the experiment exists



what success looks like



how long it runs before a decision is made



Keep research aligned to strategy rather than constantly chasing new trends



Team Process

Establish lightweight rituals that actually help (standups, planning, retros)



Create meeting structures that work across time zones (e.g., two-pass sync + notes)



Improve internal documentation and communication flow



What We’re Looking For (Most Important)

Strong experience shipping product in fast-moving environments



Excellent at writing requirements that eliminate ambiguity



Confident prioritizer: can protect focus and reduce roadmap chaos



Highly organized and execution-driven: you push work to completion



Deep Jira experience (backlog hygiene, sprint planning, workflows)



Able to coordinate distributed teams across time zones



Great communicator: you align stakeholders without creating friction



Comfortable working with technical teams, including AI/R&D workflows



Nice to Have

Experience with creator tools, media products, or video workflows



Experience managing hybrid teams (product + R&D + engineering)



Strong background as a business analyst or product ops lead



Experience building internal systems/processes from scratch



How We Work

Small team, high ownership — you’ll drive outcomes directly



Lightweight process: crisp requirements, fast iteration, measurable results



Strong bias to action and clarity



We value execution, not performative process
